announce_vault_teleporter_does_nothing.en: It's always something with that moon magic.
announce_vault_teleporter_does_nothing.trans: 那月亮魔法时不时就要出点问题。

1.en: May this tribute sate the beast.
1.trans: 这份贡品能够让野兽心满意足。

announce_accomplishment.en: I need to pass the time somehow.
announce_accomplishment.trans: 我得想点办法打发时间。

describe_plantstressorhappiness.en: I'd better have a word with that underperforming plant...
describe_plantstressorhappiness.trans: 我最好和业绩不佳的植物谈谈……

announce_elixir_ghostvision.en: I'd rather sleep like the dead.
announce_elixir_ghostvision.trans: 我宁愿拥有死者般的睡眠。

1.en: This plant's secrets are revealing themselves to me.
1.trans: 这株植物正在向我透露秘密。

announce_cavein.en: The ceiling is going to collapse!

announce_nodaysleep_cave.en: Sleeping now would mess up my sleep schedule!
announce_nodaysleep_cave.trans: 现在睡觉会打乱我的作息规律！

announce_damp.trans: 身上打湿了可不够体面。

announce_eyeofterror_arrive.trans: 多么宏伟的惊恐之物啊。

announce_despawn.en: Say, pal, I don't look so good...
announce_despawn.trans: 喂，朋友，我看上去状态不佳……

announce_cantbuildhere_yotb_post.en: This seems a bit far from the festivities, don't you think?
announce_cantbuildhere_yotb_post.trans: 这似乎离节日活动有点远，你不觉得吗？

announce_plant_randomseed.en: It had better grow into something worthwhile.
announce_plant_randomseed.trans: 它最好能成长为有价值的东西。

announce_hot.en: My heart can't stand the heat!
announce_hot.trans: 我的心脏不能承受这样的高温！

announce_research.en: Knowledge is power. And power is... well, power.
announce_research.trans: 知识就是力量。而力量就是...好吧，还是力量。

announce_lightsout_shadowhand.en: Hmm... could you be... trying to help?

announce_rabbitkinghorn_badspawnpoint.en: Typical rabbit. Never there when you need them.
announce_rabbitkinghorn_badspawnpoint.trans: 真不愧是兔子。你需要它们的时候，它们永远不会出现。

announce_shadowthrall_stealth.en: Who bit me? Show yourself, coward!

announce_ticoon_near_kitcoon.en: Ah, we must be near a kitcoon...
announce_ticoon_near_kitcoon.trans: 啊，我们已经靠近小浣猫了……

burning.en: Keep those flames away from my eyebrows!
burning.trans: 那些火苗拿得离我的眉毛远点！

targetincombat.en: Perhaps I should take a step back.

notready.en: I'll give an offering once the imminent danger has passed.
notready.trans: 等火烧眉毛的危险过去我再行动。

empty.en: Well I need something to build with.
empty.trans: 嗯，我需要一些建造材料。

no_tophat.en: I'll need a top hat for this trick to work.
no_tophat.trans: 我需要顶高礼帽才能完成这个魔术。

hermitcrab_relocate.en: Ugh, empty! I'll do it later.

inmood.en: Perhaps once the beast has settled down and is willing to be reasonable.
inmood.trans: 等这个动物冷静下来，也许它会愿意听话。

beef_hitched.en: The beast is ready to be judged.
beef_hitched.trans: 可以评判一下这只野兽了。

needbeef.en: Here's the hitch pal, I'm going to need a beefalo.
needbeef.trans: 桩子有了，现在需要一头皮弗娄牛。

needbeef_closer.en: Get over here, you hairy imbecile!
needbeef_closer.trans: 过来，你这个毛绒绒的笨蛋！

dead.en: The dead have no need of such things.

full.en: No sense giving them more than they can carry.
full.trans: 给他们太多东西却背不动，这没意义。

unsuitable_for_plants.en: Why must the plants be so picky?
unsuitable_for_plants.trans: 为什么植物一定要这么挑剔？

oversizedveggies_too_small.en: This one is insignificant in comparison.
oversizedveggies_too_small.trans: 相比之下，这个显得微不足道。

notamerm.en: Even I won't stoop so low as to steal from these wretches.
notamerm.trans: 就算是我，也不会沦落到去偷这些可怜虫的东西。

restricted.en: I don't have the magic word.

inuse.en: I'm quite adept at waiting. I've had a lot of practice.
inuse.trans: 我善于等待。对此我已经训练有素了。

notmasterchef.en: I have more important things to do than that.
notmasterchef.trans: 我还有更重要的事情要做。

notsouljarhandler.en: Souls are a different thing altogether.
notsouljarhandler.trans: 灵魂则完全是另一回事。

generic.en: Curses.

inuse.en: I can wait... it's the courteous thing to do.
inuse.trans: 我可以等…做这事很得体。

generic.en: I'm unable to do that right now.

no_racers.en: This race seems to be decidedly lacking in racers.
no_racers.trans: 这场比赛明显缺少参赛选手。

nogeneratorskill.en: That would be an amateurish misuse of its magic.
nogeneratorskill.trans: 那会是外行人误用它的魔法。

notdish.en: That wouldn't be a very good sacrifice, now would it?
notdish.trans: 这不算什么好祭品，对吧？

mushroomfarm_needsshroom.en: A mushroom would be more suited to this.
mushroomfarm_needsshroom.trans: 一个蘑菇会更适合这个。

nomoon.en: It's not going to work in here.

dead.en: The dead have no need of such things.

foodfull.en: We've already placed something on the altar.
foodfull.trans: 我们已经在祭坛上放了祭品。

wrongshadowform.en: The bones were too amateurishly assembled.
wrongshadowform.trans: 这骨头组装的太外行了。

notamonkey.en: I'm not wasting my time with this monkey business.
notamonkey.trans: 我不会在这种猴子的事情上浪费时间。

mushroomfarm_needslog.en: A living log would be more suited to this.
mushroomfarm_needslog.trans: 一块活着的木头会更适合这个。

ghostheart.en: I don't think so. They might still be mad.
ghostheart.trans: 我不这么想。他们也许还在发疯。

pigkinggame_danger.en: I have bigger things to worry about right now.
pigkinggame_danger.trans: 我现在有更重要的事情要担心。

wronggem.en: That would be an amateurish misuse of its magic.
wronggem.trans: 那会是外行人误用它的魔法。

notgem.en: Even The Amazing Maxwell couldn't wring magic from that.
notgem.trans: 即使神奇的麦斯威尔也没办法从那施展魔法。

carnivalgame_already_playing.en: It seems I'll have to bide my time.

terrarium_refuse.en: Nothing. I wonder how it might respond to the fuel...
terrarium_refuse.trans: 没反应。我想知道它可能对燃料有什么反应……

terrarium_cooldown.en: There's nothing in there to receive our offering. Yet.
terrarium_cooldown.trans: 里面没东西接受我们的供品。再等等。

pigkinggame_toolate.en: It's much too late for that.

mushroomfarm_nomoonallowed.en: The blasted thing refuses to grow!
mushroomfarm_nomoonallowed.trans: 这该死的东西拒绝生长！

cantshadowrevive.en: It refuses to bend to my will.
cantshadowrevive.trans: 它拒绝屈服于我的意志。

duplicate.en: That can already be made here.

pigkinggame_messy.en: Ugh. I'm not doing anything in that mess.
pigkinggame_messy.trans: 天啊，我才不要在那堆烂摊子里做任何事。

generic.en: I should think not.

spidernohat.en: Its dapperness would be wasted in my pocket.
spidernohat.trans: 它这么帅，放我口袋里就浪费了。

notsculptable.en: That is certainly not for sculpting with.
notsculptable.trans: 那肯定不是用来雕刻的。

nomoonincaves.en: Its power can't reach the "moon" from here.
nomoonincaves.trans: 它的力量无法从这里到达 "月亮"。

toomanybees.en: There's such a thing as too many bees, pal.
toomanybees.trans: 有一种东西叫做蜜蜂过多，伙计。

birdsblocked.en: He even stops the birds from coming and going?
birdsblocked.trans: 他居然把飞进飞出的鸟儿都挡下了？

generic.en: I must deal with this first.
generic.trans: 我必须先处理这个问题。

notentacleground.en: Tentacles are ill-suited to this place.

toomanybirds.en: There are plenty of birds here already.
toomanybirds.trans: 这里已经有许多鸟儿了。

nohorticulture.trans: 这里没有值得种植的东西。

nobirds.en: There are plenty of birds here already.
nobirds.trans: 这里已经有许多鸟儿了。

nosilviculture.en: Making invisible trees grow? Now that'd be a trick.
nosilviculture.trans: 让看不见的树生长？这个把戏不错。

nofires.en: For once, nothing is on fire.

alreadyfullmoon.en: For once, magic is not needed.

nosleeptargets.en: Nobody wants a bedtime story from the bogeyman, is that it?
nosleeptargets.trans: 没人想听大坏蛋讲睡前故事吗？

nowaternearby.en: I can't just conjure up fish without water.
nowaternearby.trans: 没有水，就算是我也幻化不出鱼。

deadbirds.en: It's bad luck now... for the birds.
deadbirds.trans: 走不走运……我是说这些鸟。

waytoomanybirds.en: I must wait before I summon the birds again.
waytoomanybirds.trans: 在我召唤鸟儿之前，我必须等待。

hashat.en: There's a stupid hat in the way.

stackedtoohigh.en: I'm not stacking it any higher.

nospace.en: There's an inconsiderate wretch taking up that space.
nospace.trans: 有个不识趣的家伙占着那地方。

targetincombat.en: Perhaps I should take a step back.

inuse.en: Once again the seat of power is stolen from me!
inuse.trans: 我的力量之椅又被偷了！

sleeping.trans: 快起床，你这头懒惰的野兽。

alreadyknown.en: An old pattern. I've no use for it.
alreadyknown.trans: 这个旧的样式对我毫无用处。

nohealth.en: I must wait and regain my strength.

generic.en: only_used_by_walter

burning.en: Oh. There go all my good pocket squares.
burning.trans: 唉，我的口袋方巾全没了。

nooccupant.en: I think you're forgetting something, pal...
nooccupant.trans: 我觉得你忘了什么，朋友...

inuse.en: They're in much more dire need of it.

notenoughhair.en: There's nothing for me to work with.

generic.en: How could you improve on perfection?

too_late.en: Those blasted things move too fast!
too_late.trans: 那些该死的东西移动得太快了！

nocarnival.en: Finally. It looks like the birds have dispersed.
nocarnival.trans: 看起来鸟儿们总算散去了。

pillowfight_no_handpillow.en: If I'm going to humiliate myself, I can at least do it properly.
pillowfight_no_handpillow.trans: 没见过这么糟蹋自己的。

notmybernie.en: Willow, your abominable bear is running amok!
notmybernie.trans: 薇洛，你的破熊不听调遣了！

notmerm.en: Isn't that a job for the little toad?
notmerm.trans: 这不是那个小蟾蜍的工作吗？

locked_gate.en: I shall have to find the key.

kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiding_sp.en: This environment is not suitable for a fair game.
kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiding_sp.trans: 这种环境不适合进行公平的游戏。

kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiders.en: It seems we are lacking in participants.

carnival_host_here.en: I thought I saw that feathered charlatan around here...
carnival_host_here.trans: 我明明在附近看到了那个有羽毛的骗子……

hostbusy.en: Apparently he has more pressing matters to attend to.
hostbusy.trans: 显然，他有更紧迫的事情要处理。

noresponse.en: Where did he wander off to now?

alreadyactive.en: There must be a competition going on elsewhere...
alreadyactive.trans: 其他地方一定还有个比赛……

doesntwork.trans: 那个没用的裁判去哪了？

professionalchef.en: I have more important things to do than that.
professionalchef.trans: 我还有更重要的事情要做。

wrongpiece.en: I could have told you that wouldn't fit.
wrongpiece.trans: 我本可以告诉你那不合适。

no_max_sanity.en: I fear my mind can't take the strain...
no_max_sanity.trans: 恐怕我的意志受不了那种重压……

wronggear.en: I won't use my good fishing rod in this stagnant pond.
wronggear.trans: 我不会在这潭死水里用我的好鱼竿。

quagmire_wrongkey.en: It appears there's another key around here.
quagmire_wrongkey.trans: 看来这里还有一把钥匙。

klaus.en: I'll not be done in by an overgrown Krampus.
klaus.trans: 我不会因为一只发育过度的坎普斯而疲倦不堪。

empty.en: I don't know what to wrap.
empty.trans: 我不知道该打包什么。

generic.en: I have the information I need.

fertilizer.en: I think I know quite enough.
fertilizer.trans: 我想我知道的已经够多了。

duplicate.en: That can already be made here.
duplicate.trans: 那件事从这里就可以开始进行。

not_merm.en: Well of course it only works on merms.
not_merm.trans: 当然了，它只对鱼人有效。

dead.en: The dead have no need of such things.

full.en: No sense giving them more than they can carry.
full.trans: 给他们太多东西却背不动，这没意义。

glassed.en: I can't do that while it's covered in moon glass.
glassed.trans: 做不到，因为被月光玻璃覆盖了。

already_bombed.en: No need to do it twice.

awakebeefalo.en: I don't think she'd take kindly to that.
awakebeefalo.trans: 她应该不会乖乖躺着被剃毛。

nobits.en: But it's already as smooth as a baby's rear end.
nobits.trans: 但是它已经像婴儿屁股一样光滑了。

generic.en: To what end?

webberonly.en: I don't hold any power over them.

doer_isnt_module_owner.en: Hmph. It's not worth my time.

inuse.en: Hmph. You're adding too much salt.

generic.en: Nothing ever goes as planned.

messagebottlemanager_not_found.en: I'll extract its secrets once I find some suitable lighting.
messagebottlemanager_not_found.trans: 等我找到点光线以后再发掘它的秘密。

known.en: I am far too advanced for this.
known.trans: 我早就超过这个水平了。

wrongworld.en: I seem to be in the wrong place to use this.
wrongworld.trans: 我似乎把使用它的方法搞错了。

cantlearn.en: There's a lesson to be learned about tampering with secret knowledge.
cantlearn.trans: 涉足秘密知识的经验教训。

1.en: Well, that didn't quite work as I planned.
1.trans: 好吧，跟我计划的完全不一样。

1.en: Say, pal, why don't you come work for me?
1.trans: 朋友，你怎么不来给我打工啊？

full_of_curses.en: I will not fall for that again.

restriction.en: I have no use of such things.
restriction.trans: 这种东西对我毫无用处。

noimage.en: My memory isn't good enough to draw from it.
noimage.trans: 我的记忆力不好，想不起来了。

restricted.en: I don't have the magic word.

inuse.en: Worry not, pal. I've the patience of a saint.
inuse.trans: 朋友，不要担心。我有圣人般的耐心。

notsouljarhandler.en: Souls are a different thing altogether.
notsouljarhandler.trans: 灵魂则完全是另一回事。

notmasterchef.en: I have more important things to do than that.
notmasterchef.trans: 我还有更重要的事情要做。

generic.en: It wouldn't fit.

notempty.en: First I must remove its contents.
notempty.trans: 首先，我必须把里面的东西拿走。

cooking.en: I'd rather not lay my hands on a hot stove, thank you very much.
cooking.trans: 我可不愿意拿手去摸热炉子，谢谢您。

notnow.en: He's attending to some other business, presently.

haspet.trans: 一只宠物就意味着足够的责任了。

ticoon.trans: 我已经招募了一只大虎。

mounted.en: Even with my long arms, I still can't reach.
mounted.trans: 我这么长的手臂，还是够不到。

bad_timing0.en: I must time this perfectly if I'm to succeed.

bad_timing2.en: Hmph. Physical labor is more suited to underlings.
bad_timing2.trans: 噗。体力劳动还是交给下等人去做比较好。

beef_bell_has_beef_already.en: One smelly beast following me around is more than enough.
beef_bell_has_beef_already.trans: 有一只臭烘烘的野兽跟着我已经足够了。

already_marked.en: My choice has been made. No going back.
already_marked.trans: 我已经做出了选择。没有回头路。

not_participant.en: I'll bide my time until the next competition.
not_participant.trans: 我还是等待下一次比赛到来吧。

samedish.en: I've already put this on a dish.

mismatch.en: Clearly this is the wrong dish.

announce_nohungersleep.en: I'm too hungry. I can't sleep.

announce_snowball_too_big.en: Useless! It won't get any bigger.

announce_nonightsiesta_cave.en: It's a bit creepy out for that.

describe_plantstressorkilljoys.en: Maybe if the garden wasn't filled with weeds...
describe_plantstressorkilljoys.trans: 如果花园里不长满杂草，也许……

announce_nonightsiesta.en: It's sleep time, not siesta time.
announce_nonightsiesta.trans: 现在是睡觉时间，不是午休时间。

announce_dusk.en: It'll be dark soon. Charlie will be waking up.
announce_dusk.trans: 天马上就黑了。查理该醒了。

announce_equip_shadowlevel_t4.en: The shadow puppets I summon will be unstoppable!
announce_equip_shadowlevel_t4.trans: 我召唤出的暗影傀儡将所向披靡！

announce_fertilizer_researched.en: I'm growing more knowledgeable than I'd care to be about this stuff.
announce_fertilizer_researched.trans: 我对这些东西的了解越来越多了。

announce_snared_ivy.en: Wretched greenery! Release me at once!
announce_snared_ivy.trans: 卑鄙的绿色植物！马上放开我！

1.trans: 我必须锻炼自己的耐心。

2.en: I daresay, this is almost relaxing.
2.trans: 我必须说，差点就让我放松了。

3.en: Why won't they take the bait? Perhaps I should offer secret knowledge...
3.trans: 它们为什么不咬钩？也许我该拿出点秘密知识吸引它们……

4.en: I am beginning to tire of all this waiting.
4.trans: 我开始厌倦这一切的等待了

announce_hunt_successful_fork.en: The creature is unaware it's being pursued. Now, to strike.
announce_hunt_successful_fork.trans: 这个生物不知道它正在被追捕。立即出手。

announce_detach_buff_workeffectiveness.en: My enthusiasm for this has run dry.

announce_cozy_sleep.en: That was a marginally more restful sleep than usual.
announce_cozy_sleep.trans: 这一觉睡得比平时好一点点。

announce_mega_flare_seen.en: That flare's going to send some poor fool into a world of trouble.
announce_mega_flare_seen.trans: 那颗信号弹会为某个倒霉蛋带来无穷的麻烦。

announce_rabbitking_aggressive.trans: 脚底下正在疯狂的活动。

announce_weak_rat.en: The creature is past its prime.

announce_nosleeponfire.en: That might not be the best idea.
announce_nosleeponfire.trans: 这可能不是最好的主意。

quagmire_announce_notrecipe.en: This combination of food was ill-advised.
quagmire_announce_notrecipe.trans: 这样的食物组合不太合适。

describe_plantstressorovercrowding.en: The garden might be overcrowded. Perhaps I should thin it out a bit.
describe_plantstressorovercrowding.trans: 花园可能太拥挤了。也许我应该让它稀疏一些。

yotb_post.en: Enjoy your time in the spotlight while you can.
yotb_post.trans: 趁着你还能享受，好好享受你在聚光灯下的时光吧。

deerclopseyeball_sentryward_kit.en: Do I have to do everything around here?

generic.en: I really don't care for gardening.

empty.en: Surely there must be some water nearby.
empty.trans: 附近一定有水吧。

held.en: Don't worry, rabbit. Everything is under control.
held.trans: 别担心，小兔子。一切都在掌握之中。

generic.en: I've been here too long... it actually looks tasty.
generic.trans: 我已经在这里太久了...它看上去确实很美味。

unimplemented.en: Just what are you up to now, Charlie?

cozy_bunnyman.en: I could have sworn I left you all underground.
cozy_bunnyman.trans: 我记得当初把你们留在地下了。

beetletaur.en: Back to the dungeons with you!

twinofterror2.en: Ah. Just what we needed, a fresh pair of eyes...
twinofterror2.trans: 啊。这正是我们需要的，一双新鲜的眼睛......

wortox_nabbag.en: I knew that imp couldn't be trusted.
wortox_nabbag.trans: 我就知道那个小恶魔信不过！

twinofterror1.en: Ah. Just what we needed, a fresh pair of eyes...
twinofterror1.trans: 啊。这正是我们需要的，一双新鲜的眼睛......

chessjunk1.en: There's a reason I never finished that.
chessjunk1.trans: 我没做完那家伙是有原因的。

oceanfishinglure_spoon_green.en: At least I don't have to use worms.

moose.en: It's definitely from the North, whatever that is.
moose.trans: 不论那是什么，它一定是从北方来的。

reviver.en: I'm not sure I really want to give this up.
reviver.trans: 我不确定我真想放弃这个。

boat_magnet_kit.en: Blast it Higgsbury, I can barely read these scribbled instructions.
boat_magnet_kit.trans: 去你的希格斯伯里，字迹潦草到我基本看不清。

trinket_9.en: My suits don't deserve to be defaced with these tacky atrocities.
trinket_9.trans: 我的西装不应该被粗糙的做工给毁了。

trinket_8.en: I'd prefer a pocketwatch on a chain.
trinket_8.trans: 我更喜欢带链子的怀表。

trinket_7.en: Not something a grown man should be caught playing with.
trinket_7.trans: 成年人玩这个可不太像话。

lavaarena_tiaraflowerpetalshat.en: A decent wreath, should I feel like healing.
lavaarena_tiaraflowerpetalshat.trans: 这花环不错，如果对我有治愈力的话。

firestarter.en: She's a firestarter. And a twisted one, at that.
firestarter.trans: 她是引火人。在那方面，她是个变态。

ghost.en: We will require a heart to bring you back, %s.
ghost.trans: %s，我们需要心把你带回来。

murderer.en: Murderous fiend! Taste my wrath!
murderer.trans: 杀人不眨眼的恶魔！让你尝尝我的愤怒！

reviver.en: %s has bent reality to her fiery will.
reviver.trans: %s已经将现实屈服于她的强烈意志。

generic.en: Greetings, Ms. %s.

trinket_6.en: I might hide those in the robot's bedroll if I get bored.
trinket_6.trans: 要是我厌烦了，可以把这些藏在机器人的铺盖下。

trinket_5.en: A toy for a child's mind.

nitre.en: One third of the way there...

trinket_4.en: Don't look at me like that.

eating_corpse.trans: 咀嚼的时候闭上你的鸟嘴！

generic.en: It looks hungry.

teleportato_box.en: This is a box full of sadness and woe.
teleportato_box.trans: 这是一个充满悲伤和痛苦的盒子。

trinket_3.trans: 乱糟糟的一团。就像生活。

calm.en: The heart of the city is still.

nomagic.en: The pulse has no influence here.

trinket_1.en: These must have been heated to an incredible temperature.
trinket_1.trans: 这些东西肯定曾被加热到极高的温度。

minisign_item.en: A sign is useless if it has nothing to mark.
minisign_item.trans: 如果木牌没有标记，那就一无是处。

asparagus.en: We must always eat our vegetables.

generic.en: Get me out of here!

full.en: I'd rather stay here than mingle with the crowds above.
full.trans: 我宁愿待在这里，也不和上面的人群同流合污。

livinglog.en: I like the noise they make when you burn them.
livinglog.trans: 我喜欢它们被点燃时的声音。

tree_rock_seed.en: Do I have to dig in the dirt? With my hands?
tree_rock_seed.trans: 就非得让我挖土？用我这双手？

halloweenpotion_moon.en: A fine pot of tea, with a side of mutation.
halloweenpotion_moon.trans: 一壶好茶，附带变异效果。

wereitem_moose.en: Almost as powerful as it is tacky.
wereitem_moose.trans: 俗不可耐，但是异常强大。

bigfoot.en: Now that is surely fuel for nightmares.
bigfoot.trans: 现在，它显然会助长梦魇的气焰。

rabbitkinghorn_chest.en: You think I'd trust their ilk to hold my things?
rabbitkinghorn_chest.trans: 你觉得我会信任他们会好好保管我的东西吗？

burnt.trans: 烤熟的鱼人头。真是太美味了。

generic.en: The eyes follow you around.

rat.en: You will thank me for making you stronger.
rat.trans: 你会感谢我让你变得强健。

generic.en: An exercise machine... the most dastardly of inventions.
generic.trans: 一台运动机器……最为邪恶的发明。

yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint_item.en: The dumb little creatures would be lost without them.
yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint_item.trans: 少了它们小蠢货们会迷路。

quagmire_spotspice_sprig.trans: 它可以给食物增添辛香风味。

pigtorch.trans: 太好了。现在他们有火了。

boatrace_primemate.en: Are you supposed to be intimidating?

book_research_station.en: Hmph. It doesn't hold a candle to the secret knowledge I possess.
book_research_station.trans: 哼，它这点东西跟我所拥有的秘密知识相比不过是九牛一毛。

beef_bell.en: It appears to have some kind of hypnotic effect on beefalo.
beef_bell.trans: 它好像能催眠皮弗娄牛。

corn_cooked.en: A little more refined, at least.

medium.en: This enchantment is not of my doing.
medium.trans: 这魅惑不是我弄出来的。

level1.en: I can sense strong magic within it.
level1.trans: 我可以感觉它体内强大的魔法。

generic.en: Hm? What a familiar presence.

level3.en: ...I wonder how my brother is doing.
level3.trans: ……不知道我的兄弟现在怎么样。

haunted_pocket.en: I should quit toying with this now.
haunted_pocket.trans: 我现在该停止玩弄这个了。

soon.en: Whatever it is will be arriving soon.
soon.trans: 不管怎么样它很快就到。

long.en: I can sense strong magic within it.
long.trans: 我可以感觉它体内强大的魔法。

level2.en: A powerful bond tethers this spirit to our world.
level2.trans: 这个幽灵跟我们的世界有着强大的羁绊。

foliage.en: A meal fit for a peasant.

kitcoon_desert.en: What a pathetic little creature. Those ears are ridiculous.
kitcoon_desert.trans: 多么可悲的小动物。这对耳朵简直离谱。

firestarter.en: Like a moth to flame. Or a spider, maybe.
firestarter.trans: 就像飞蛾扑火。或者也许是蜘蛛。

ghost.en: Looks like you got squashed, %s.
ghost.trans: %s，你看起来像被压坏了。

murderer.en: So, %s, you're a monster after all!
murderer.trans: 所以，%s，你终究还是个怪物！

reviver.en: This child, %s, doesn't have a mean bone in his body.

generic.en: Greetings, Mr. %s.

pitchfork.en: The tool of choice for perfectionists.
pitchfork.trans: 完美主义者的理想工具。

charcoal.trans: 没什么能偷走我的木炭！

chesspiece_catcoon.en: This animal commands respect through violence.
chesspiece_catcoon.trans: 这种动物通过暴力获得尊重。

yotd_steeringwheel_item.en: Hard labor? Isn't that Winona's forte?
yotd_steeringwheel_item.trans: 干苦力？去找薇诺娜啊，找我干吗？

klaussackkey.en: Magic has done things to this beast's horn.
klaussackkey.trans: 魔法改变了这只野兽的角。

wintersfeastfuel.en: I prefer my fuel more nightmarish.
wintersfeastfuel.trans: 我更喜欢噩梦风格的燃料。

slingshotammo_gold.en: Ah, now that might be interesting.

generic.en: An impure orange gem.

has_item.en: Who set this table? It's all wrong.
has_item.trans: 这张桌子是谁摆的？全弄错了。

generic.en: Someone should really set this table.
generic.trans: 找个人来摆好这张桌子吧。

standing.trans: 哼...令人印象深刻的戏法。

sitting.en: This must be the work of an unseen hand.
sitting.trans: 这肯定是一只看不见的手的作品。

carnivalcannon_kit.en: Must I do everything around here?
carnivalcannon_kit.trans: 这里所有的事我都必须亲力亲为么？

hermitcrab.en: I have better things to do than being berated by an old crab.
hermitcrab.trans: 我干嘛留在这让一只老螃蟹骂。

potato_seeds.en: Am I supposed to plant these?

hermitcrab_relocation_kit.en: Picky crab wants the perfect spot.
hermitcrab_relocation_kit.trans: 挑剔的螃蟹要挑完美地段。

battlesong_instant_taunt.en: My acts were always a bit more improvisational.
battlesong_instant_taunt.trans: 我的表演通常是即兴的。

carnivaldecor_lamp.en: A paltry light source. But it will do.
carnivaldecor_lamp.trans: 一个微不足道的光源。但也够了。

halloweencandy_14.en: Only ruffians enjoy torturing themselves like this.
halloweencandy_14.trans: 只有歹徒喜欢这样折磨自己。

goldenshovel.en: This shovel is worth a princely sum.

plantmeat_cooked.en: The heat has made this a suitable meal.

palmcone_scale.en: It fell from the tree. Perhaps I'll make use of it.
palmcone_scale.trans: 是树上掉下来的。也许我能用上它。

target_too_far_away.en: His nose may be good, but I doubt it's good enough to track that far.
target_too_far_away.trans: 他的鼻子虽然灵，但恐怕也追踪不到那么远。

lost_track.en: Blasted, we weren't fast enough! Sniff faster, beast!
lost_track.trans: 该死的，太慢了！快点闻闻，野兽！

tracking_not_mine.en: That ticoon is not working for me. Yet.
tracking_not_mine.trans: 那只大虎目前不替我打工。

abandoned.en: I didn't need his help anyway.
abandoned.trans: 反正我也不需要他的帮助。

nearby.trans: 啊哈……有小浣猫在附近活动。

tracking.en: He seems onto something. I shall let him take the lead.
tracking.trans: 他似乎发现了什么。我姑且跟着看看。

generic.en: This high status catcoon has a talent for finding the kits. I respect him only marginally more.
generic.trans: 这只德高望重的浣猫极具寻找小猫咪的天赋。不过我对他也只是稍微地尊重。

feather_crow.en: Black is the color of sleep.

generic.en: I suppose even a thief has its admirers.
generic.trans: 好吧，看来小偷也有自己的仰慕者。

burnt.en: Seems not everyone appreciates the little thieves.
burnt.trans: 看来有人不喜欢这些小毛贼。

empty.en: It seems we're supposed to offer it something.
empty.trans: 看样子我们应该拿出一点供品来。

halloweencandy_10.en: No one is above enjoying a good lollipop.

halloweencandy_11.en: Eating them makes me feel powerful.
halloweencandy_11.trans: 吃了它们让我觉得力量无穷。

quagmire_pot_syrup.en: I need to sweeten the pot.
quagmire_pot_syrup.trans: 我需要给这锅菜增加点甜味。

redmooneye.en: Its aura can be felt from anywhere. Quite useful.
redmooneye.trans: 它的气场任何地方都感觉得到。相当有用。

lordfruitfly.en: Hmph, they let just anyone be a lord these days.
lordfruitfly.trans: 哼，现在这世道，谁都能称王了。

wereitem_beaver.en: It seems he's learning to bend the curse to his will.
wereitem_beaver.trans: 他好像正在学习掌控诅咒。

boat_rotator.en: If I hear one word of complaint, I'm turning this boat around.
boat_rotator.trans: 如果我听到一个字的抱怨，我就把这艘船调头。

wrong_tile.en: Impudent plant. This patch of ground isn't good enough for you?
wrong_tile.trans: 不知好歹的植物。这块地对你来说还不够好？

wrong_season.trans: 耐心点。它的时间会来到的。

generic.en: It's coming along nicely.

spear_wathgrithr_lightning.en: I can sense the power crackling within it.
spear_wathgrithr_lightning.trans: 我能感觉到它内部噼啪作响的力量。

generic.en: They aren't very sociable.

sleeping.en: Sleep is only a temporary escape.

rope.en: You'd think this would have more uses.
rope.trans: 你会认为这东西有更多用途。

wx78module_movespeed2.en: That robot needs to pull themselves together.
wx78module_movespeed2.trans: 那个机器人需要把自己的零件都装好。

wx78module_light.en: That robot needs to pull themselves together.
wx78module_light.trans: 那个机器人需要把自己的零件都装好。

hedgehound.en: The critics here will really eat you alive.
hedgehound.trans: 这里的批评家真的会活活吃掉你。

mulleddrink.en: It brings a small respite from this wretched cold.
mulleddrink.trans: 能在糟糕的严寒中带来一丝慰藉。

fishmeat_dried.en: My teeth are getting too old for this.
fishmeat_dried.trans: 我的牙根本咬不动这个。

diseasing.en: I think it's sick or something.

picked.en: What use are you to me if you don't have fruit?
picked.trans: 你都没果子了，对我还有什么用？

withered.en: It resembles Woodie, does it not?

generic.en: It labors to make my dinner.
generic.trans: 费劲巴力的生长不过为了变成我的晚餐。

barren.en: It is fruitless and useless now.
barren.trans: 不结果了，所以也没用了。

generic.en: Some fresh seafood would be a welcome sight.
generic.trans: 看到新鲜海鲜心情会好一些了。

generic.en: It's alive in there.

antlionhat.en: If the ground displeases me, I'll pull it up by the roots.
antlionhat.trans: 如果地面让我不高兴，我会把它连根拔起。

generic.en: The blue ones are good for, uh, something.
generic.trans: 这些蓝色的会有点好处。

wx78module_maxhunger1.en: That robot needs to pull themselves together.
wx78module_maxhunger1.trans: 那个机器人需要把自己的零件都装好。

abandoned.en: Not surprised. It was poorly made.
abandoned.trans: 毫不意外。本来就是粗制滥造。

burnt.en: It's too brittle to hang anything now.
burnt.trans: 现在太脆了，什么都挂不了。

generic.en: Hm. Why didn't we think of this sooner?
generic.trans: 哇！我们怎么就没早点想到？

adventure_portal.en: So that's where I left that thing!
adventure_portal.trans: 这就是我留下那件东西的地方了！

noeyeball.en: Don't say I didn't warn you when it all goes up in flames.
noeyeball.trans: 别等烧起来的时候才埋怨我没警告你。

generic.en: Keeps it cold like my heart.
generic.trans: 像我的心一样保持寒冷。

mastupgrade_lamp_item_yotd.en: Far more practical than setting a fire on our boat.
mastupgrade_lamp_item_yotd.trans: 远比在我们的船上放火实用多了。

trap_teeth_maxwell.en: I'm... sure I had my reasons when I placed this.
trap_teeth_maxwell.trans: 我确信我放置这东西是有原因的。

quagmire_pot.en: Magic could bring it to a boil faster, you know.
quagmire_pot.trans: 魔法能让它更快沸腾，你知道的。

slurper.en: Simple creatures. They exist only to sleep and feed.
slurper.trans: 单纯的生物。它们活着只是为了吃吃睡睡。

ocean_trawler_kit.en: Another irksome chore, left to me.
ocean_trawler_kit.trans: 怎么又把这种烦人的琐事留给了我。

saltrock.en: Am I to be a salt miner now?
saltrock.trans: 我就是个挖盐的矿工了？

generic.en: What!? What do you want?

yotd_anchor.en: Such exquisite craftsmanship. Into the water it goes.
yotd_anchor.trans: 抢夺天工的手艺。扔水里吧。

wx78module_movespeed.en: That robot needs to pull themselves together.
wx78module_movespeed.trans: 那个机器人需要把自己的零件都装好。

salty_dog.en: Don't you DARE shake seawater all over my suit!
salty_dog.trans: 你敢把海水甩到我的西装上试试！

spear_gungnir.en: I would never stoop to such things.
spear_gungnir.trans: 我绝不会对这种东西屈服。

forgetmelots.trans: 就是些再普通不过的野草。

spice_chili.en: Bit of a kick in the pants.

generic.en: Rebuilding her library, is she?

boat_bumper_yotd_kit.en: Ugh. These menial tasks do not suit me.
boat_bumper_yotd_kit.trans: 呃。这些琐碎的工作并不适合我。

razor.en: If only the world had a single neck.
razor.trans: 要是整个世界只有一个脖子该多好。

slingshot_frame_gems.en: He'll shoot his eye out if he's not careful.
slingshot_frame_gems.trans: 他一不小心就会把自己的眼睛打瞎。

kitcoon_moon.en: What a pathetic little creature. It requires dental work.
kitcoon_moon.trans: 多么可悲的小动物。它该去看牙医了。

dumbbell_heat.en: You won't catch me lugging it around.
dumbbell_heat.trans: 你不会逮着我拖着它到处走。

pudgy.en: I suppose some people might find that charming.
pudgy.trans: 我想有些人会觉得那个东西很有魅力。

mypartner.en: I suppose I'm saddled with this creature now.
mypartner.trans: 我想我已经跟这个生物捆绑在一起了。

ornery.en: Yes, you understand how this works.
ornery.trans: 是的，你懂得这个是怎么运行的。

dead_mypartner.en: How dare you die on me!

dead.en: They smell even worse when they're dead.
dead.trans: 它们死后气味会更难闻。

domesticated.en: I like a creature that knows its place.
domesticated.trans: 我喜欢知道自己身份的生物。

naked.en: Now it looks dumb AND pathetic.
naked.trans: 现在它看起来傻不拉几又惨兮兮的。

rider.en: I'd only ride you if I was desperate.
rider.trans: 我只有在绝望的时候才会骑上你。

generic.en: Just look at that stupid beast.
generic.trans: 看看那头愚蠢的动物吧。

sleeping.en: It's only marginally less stupid when it's asleep.
sleeping.trans: 它睡着后也还是一副蠢样。

quagmire_oven.en: This makes things much more convenient.
quagmire_oven.trans: 有了这个东西，就方便多了。

playing.en: Well, I suppose a bit of destruction might be relaxing.
playing.trans: 好吧，也许毁灭能带来放松吧。

generic.en: It requires payment.

powder_monkey.en: You're not one of mine... where did you come from?!
powder_monkey.trans: 你不是我的人……你从哪里来的？

dustmoth.en: Hmph. Just stay away from my suit, pal.
dustmoth.trans: 哎，离我的西装远一点，伙计。

blueprint.trans: 那是个什么？值得费那么些个功夫？

generic.en: One false move could send the whole pile tumbling down.
generic.trans: 只要走错一步就可能导致整堆都翻倒。

pumpkin_cooked.en: A little more refined, at least.

bandage.en: Sticky and gooey and good for putting on booboos.
bandage.trans: 又黏又甜，疗伤效果不错。

voltgoatjelly.en: Just because I'm old doesn't mean I like gelatin.
voltgoatjelly.trans: 我是有点年纪了，但还不至于吃流质食物。

generic.en: Vermin housing.

empty.en: Well, I guess that's that.
empty.trans: 嗯，我想就是那样了。

costume_fool_body.en: It seems the costumes are provided.

tallbird.trans: 它们是失败的实验产物。

wathgrithr_improvedhat.trans: 她这是在赤裸裸地炫耀。

greengem.en: Only the nightmare fuel will unlock its true potential.
greengem.trans: 只有噩梦燃料将释放它的真正潜力。

trunk_winter.en: The trunk thickens in the winter to hold more mucus.
trunk_winter.trans: 为了装更多鼻涕，象鼻在冬天变厚了。

quagmire_flour.en: I suppose one could make baked goods with this.
quagmire_flour.trans: 可以用它做些面包和糕点。

yotc_carrat_race_start.en: I suppose this is what I must do for entertainment now.
yotc_carrat_race_start.trans: 看来我也只能靠这个取乐了。

kelp_dried.en: Sadly, I've eaten worse out here.
kelp_dried.trans: 很不幸，我吃过比这个还难吃的。

oceantree_pillar.en: It could use a good pruning.

firestarter.en: Wasn't it you who was railing on about fire safety?
firestarter.trans: 你不是张口闭口消防安全吗？

ghost.en: Perhaps you can add this to your roster of ghost stories.
ghost.trans: 也许你可以把这个加到你的鬼故事里面。

murderer.en: Interesting, %s. I didn't think you had it in you.
murderer.trans: 有趣啊，%s。我万万没想到你会这样。

attacker.en: I do not wish to quarrel!

reviver.en: I'm afraid I can't give you a badge, only my thanks.
reviver.trans: 恐怕我没有奖章给你，只能说声谢谢。

generic.en: Greetings, Mr. %s.

burnt.en: Such a waste of time and energy.

generic.en: What is that little creature up to?

moonglass_wobster_den.en: I suppose life finds a way.

record_creepyforest.en: Forgive me if I've lost my taste for music.
record_creepyforest.trans: 抱歉，是我丢了音乐的品味。

armor_lunarplant.en: Does no one else find this armor oddly itchy?
armor_lunarplant.trans: 难道没有人觉得这套盔甲奇痒无比吗？

waterplant_baby.en: I should pluck you like the weed you are.
waterplant_baby.trans: 我应该像拔草一样拔掉你。

tentacle_pillar.trans: 这个到底能去到多深的地方？

slingshot_frame_bone.en: He'll shoot his eye out if he's not careful.
slingshot_frame_bone.trans: 他一不小心就会把自己的眼睛打瞎。

quagmire_foliage_cooked.en: I ought to mix it in with something else.
quagmire_foliage_cooked.trans: 我应当把它和其他配料混在一起。

carrot_seeds.trans: 这种低贱的活不适合我。

boat_bumper_shell_kit.en: Ugh. These menial tasks do not suit me.
boat_bumper_shell_kit.trans: 呃。这些琐碎的工作并不适合我。

carnivalgame_memory_kit.en: I suppose I'm expected to set this up myself?
carnivalgame_memory_kit.trans: 所以还指望我自己来搭这个？

watermelonhat.en: This is one way to keep cool. And sticky.
watermelonhat.trans: 这是保持凉快的一种方法。你还会觉得黏黏的。

slingshot_handle_sticky.en: He'll shoot his eye out if he's not careful.
slingshot_handle_sticky.trans: 他一不小心就会把自己的眼睛打瞎。

succulent_plant.en: Doesn't look that succulent to me.

generic.en: That's not doing anyone any good.
generic.trans: 这对任何人都没有好处。

strawhat.en: A hat fit for a peasant.

generic.en: At least it should keep them occupied.
generic.trans: 这至少能让它们有事干。

burnt.en: Whatever will we do without it.
burnt.trans: 没有它，我们还能做什么？

generic.en: Those creatures are so feeble of mind they can't tell a real bird from a wooden one.
generic.trans: 那些生物的头脑简单，连真鸟和木鸟都分不清。

undrawn.trans: 目前它上面没有任何东西。

generic.en: It was drawn in a steady hand.
generic.trans: 它是一只坚定的手画成的。

pocketwatch_parts.en: She doesn't understand the full extent of the power she's toying with.
pocketwatch_parts.trans: 她并不了解她在玩弄的力量的全貌。

blowdart_pipe.trans: 一根能造成痛苦的好管子！

generic.en: Let's get on with it then.

empty.en: It will require an offering.
empty.trans: 它需要一个祭品。

rabbitking_aggressive.en: Of course Simon's brute cousin fights his battles for him.
rabbitking_aggressive.trans: 西蒙的野蛮表弟当然会为他而战。

skeletonhat.en: A most tragic and unfitting end.

hermitcrab_shell.en: I don't understand this magic, but I respect it.
hermitcrab_shell.trans: 我不懂这魔法，但我尊重它。

undrawn.en: If only life were that simple.
undrawn.trans: 要是生活也那么简单就好了。

generic.en: Uninspired.

ghost.en: A shame about your death. You were the only one I half-liked.
ghost.trans: 你死去了。你是唯一一个我不讨厌的人。

firestarter.en: Mx. %s is making good on their promises of mayhem.
firestarter.trans: %s最后实现了蓄意破坏的承诺。

murderer.en: Murderous fiend! This will be your destruction!
murderer.trans: 杀人不眨眼的恶魔！你毁灭的时候到了！

attacker.en: If you're going to attack, at least finish the job!
attacker.trans: 你要是打算进行攻击，至少先把活干完！

reviver.en: %s never did respect human mortality.

generic.en: Greetings, Mx. %s.

held.en: I hope it doesn't stain my jacket.
held.trans: 希望它不会弄脏我的夹克。

generic.en: Magical red, and yet it holds no power of use to me.
generic.trans: 神奇的红色，但是对我而言没有用。

formal_blueprint.en: These garments are absolutely wasted on such base creatures.
formal_blueprint.trans: 把华服穿在这种基础生物的身上绝对是浪费。

glass.en: I could make use of that glass.

generic.en: I miss a good long bath.

empty.en: It's of no use to me like this.
empty.trans: 这个样子对我是没用了。

sewing_tape.en: The wilderness is tough on a tailor made suit.
sewing_tape.trans: 荒野对于定制西装而言很残酷。

dragonboat_pack.en: Here I am, toiling away for a frivolous diversion.
dragonboat_pack.trans: 我居然也沦落到为了无聊的消遣瞎忙活。

marblebean.en: Let me guess, it grows a marble stalk?
marblebean.trans: 让我猜一猜，它长出了一个大理石茎秆？

spider_healer.en: I don't think that's one of mine.

friendlyfruitfly.en: As long as it tends to the garden I'll leave it be.
friendlyfruitfly.trans: 只要它能打理好花园，我就不管它了。

generic.en: I was wise to be suspicious.

sleeping.en: I don't want to wake that one.

generic.en: It's a specialized form.

potato_cooked.en: The potato may be eaten now.

boat_item.en: I've been reduced to a common shipyard laborer.
boat_item.trans: 我沦为了普通的造船苦力。

generic.en: I somehow doubt they'd have anything I want.
generic.trans: 我有点怀疑他们会有我想要的东西。

garlic.en: I suppose that's why there are no vampires around.
garlic.trans: 吸血鬼恐怕就是被它吓跑的吧。

generic.en: It's not shadow magic.

nolight.en: I've more important things to deal with than holes in the ground.
nolight.trans: 不要拿地上的洞来烦我，我有要事在身。

picked.en: That's not growing back anytime soon.
picked.trans: 它在短期内不会重新长出来了。

generic.en: Aromatic.

fishsticks.trans: 这些应该可以让我渡过难关。

normal.en: With only one gem it is only moderately scorching.
normal.trans: 只用一块宝石，它只有一点烫。

high.en: The red gems are producing a sweltering heat.
high.trans: 这红宝石正在产生一种热得难受的温度。

generic.en: Such a spiffy design!

healingsalve.en: Just a bit of venom and some dirty old ash.
healingsalve.trans: 只有一些毒液和陈旧肮脏的灰烬。

quagmire_park_fountain.trans: 现在只是没用的碎石罢了。

waterplant_planter.en: Why would I want these to spread?
waterplant_planter.trans: 我为什么要让这些东西传播开来？

sketch.en: I'll need somewhere to sculpt it.
sketch.trans: 我需要在某个地方来雕刻它。

cave_fern.en: I'd like to step on it.

carnivaldecor_eggride.en: Wonderful. It's even tackier than I imagined it would be.
carnivaldecor_eggride.trans: 妙不可言。这比我想象的还要俗气。

carnivalgame_puckdrop_kit.en: I suppose I'm expected to set this up myself?
carnivalgame_puckdrop_kit.trans: 所以还指望我自己来搭这个？

healingsalve_acid.en: Must everything in this cursed place be either slimy or smelly or both?
healingsalve_acid.trans: 这个被诅咒的地方是不是只有黏糊糊和臭烘烘的东西？

acorn.en: A more outdoorsy type might be able to make something of this.
acorn.trans: 一个热爱户外的人或许能用它鼓捣出点东西。

quagmire_goatkid.en: He has no future ahead of him. A shame.

burnt.en: It's too brittle to hang meat on now.
burnt.trans: 它现在太脆弱了，没办法挂肉。

generic.en: Perhaps if she were fed, she'd be less ill-tempered.
generic.trans: 也许要是她吃饱了，脾气就不会这么坏了。

beehat.en: I'll wear it if I have to.
beehat.trans: 如果有必要，我会戴着它的。

handpillow_steelwool.en: At least it will make a satisfying thwack.
handpillow_steelwool.trans: 最起码用它打人的时候能发出砰的一声。

spiderhole.en: How did that get down here?
spiderhole.trans: 那东西是怎样下来这里的？

yoth_knighthat.en: Decent helmet, even with the horseface.
yoth_knighthat.trans: 虽然是张马脸，但也还算顶像样的头盔。

yotp_food1.en: Ah. I do enjoy a nice meal.

yotp_food2.en: Ugh. More fit for a creature than for me.
yotp_food2.trans: 天啊，更适合怪物，而不适合我。

nonslipgrit.en: Hmph. And Winona said I have no grit!
nonslipgrit.trans: 哼。薇诺娜当初还说我不“稳当”！

slingshot_handle_silk.en: He'll shoot his eye out if he's not careful.
slingshot_handle_silk.trans: 他一不小心就会把自己的眼睛打瞎。

yotp_food3.en: Nothing fancy, but it will do.
yotp_food3.trans: 没什么精致的，但凑合着吧。

spiderhole_rock.en: How did that get down here?
spiderhole_rock.trans: 那东西是怎样下来这里的？

armorsnurtleshell.en: That is not dapper at all.

kitcoon_yot.en: What a pathetic little creature, and in such a gaudy outfit.
kitcoon_yot.trans: 多么可悲的小动物。衣服穿得还挺艳。

boat_rotator_kit.en: Do I look like a common shipwright? Oh, very well...
boat_rotator_kit.trans: 我看起来像一个普通的船工吗？哎，也罢……

sculpture_bishophead.en: I've seen that head before... but never in marble.
sculpture_bishophead.trans: 我以前看过那个脑袋...但不是大理石做的。

monkeyqueen.en: Hmph. I'd hardly call that a throne.
monkeyqueen.trans: 哼哼。我很难把那个称为王位。

carnivaldecor_figure_kit.en: Curiosity always seems to get the better of me.
carnivaldecor_figure_kit.trans: 我总是被好奇心牵着走。

quagmire_coin4.en: We may wyrm our way out of this predicament yet.
quagmire_coin4.trans: 慢慢地，我们可能会摆脱困境呢。

quagmire_coin3.en: On my way up in the world.

wagpunk_floor_kit.en: Just how much more space does he need?
wagpunk_floor_kit.trans: 他要占多大的地盘才满足？

brokenhorn_follower.trans: 很抱歉你的角成那样了，朋友。

brokenhorn.en: It seems you've lost something, pal.
brokenhorn.trans: 你好像丢了点东西，朋友。

generic.en: Perhaps it could be reasoned with.

burnt.en: Somehow, it says even less now.
burnt.trans: 就这样，它现在透露的信息更少了。

generic.en: "Thataway"... Ugh!

construction_plans.en: I suppose I should build this.

yotc_carrat_gym_reaction_item.en: It would be prudent to place this somewhere.

steeringwheel.en: Why yes, you may call me the "Captain".
steeringwheel.trans: 行吧，你们可以尊称我"船长".

turf_road.en: At least this one is useful.

book_birds.en: What a wasteful misuse of magic.
book_birds.trans: 这么使用魔法真是浪费。

mast_item.en: Do I look like a shipyard laborer?
mast_item.trans: 我看起来像造船苦力吗？

yotc_carrat_scale_item.en: It seems some assembly is required.

acorn_sapling.en: Huh, it seems to belong in the ground.

staffcoldlight.en: An impressively condensed point of freezing magic.
staffcoldlight.trans: 冰冻魔法卓越的凝聚点。

megaflare.en: I'd have to be foolish or desperate to use that.
megaflare.trans: 我除非是傻了或是无路可走才会用它。

drumstick.trans: 吃起来味道跟浆果一样奇怪。

oceanfishingbobber_crow.en: I used to see quill floats like this back in England.
oceanfishingbobber_crow.trans: 我在英国的时候见过这种浮在海里的羽毛。

pocketwatch_portal_exit.en: Hmph. I think she puts it up there on purpose.
pocketwatch_portal_exit.trans: 哼哼。我想她是故意把它放在上面的。

merm_tool.en: Why specialize when you can be mediocre at everything, hm?
merm_tool.trans: 事事都做平庸算了，专攻有用吗？

slurper_pelt.en: In death, this creature will serve me!
slurper_pelt.trans: 这家伙死后将为我所用！

support_pillar_scaffold.en: There is work to be done. For someone else.
support_pillar_scaffold.trans: 还有些工作要做。别人的事。

has_item_light.en: The bar has been set low, I see.
has_item_light.trans: 看来门槛已经定得很低了。

generic.en: Do we not have infinitely more pressing things to do?
generic.trans: 难道我们没有更紧迫的事情要做吗？

quagmire_trader_merm2.en: I tip my hat to you sir.

teleportato_crank.en: This is used to agitate the humors.
teleportato_crank.trans: 这是用来启动幽默成分的。

hermitcrabtea_petals.en: Might need a few of these.

watertree_pillar.trans: 这东西是什么时候来的？

picked.en: We already took the food parts.
picked.trans: 我们已经拿了能吃的部分了。

generic.en: Disgusting. I'll have someone else pick it.
generic.trans: 太恶心了，我得找别人采海带。

shovel.en: This is some real advanced technology.
shovel.trans: 这可是真正的先进技术。

chesspiece_manrabbit.en: Who put this ridiculous thing here?
chesspiece_manrabbit.trans: 是谁在这搭了一个这么个荒诞的台子？

trailmix.trans: 坚果和浆果。没有放椒盐脆棒。

pomegranate_oversized.en: I'd imagine it would take quite a while to eat.
pomegranate_oversized.trans: 我想需要相当长的时间才能吃完。

carnivaldecor_eggride_kit.en: There's no end to the work around here, it seems.
carnivaldecor_eggride_kit.trans: 这里的工作没有尽头，似乎是这样。

brush.en: It's like showing affection, without actually touching it.

sentryward.en: This is a conduit for strong revelatory magicks.
sentryward.trans: 这是一个用于强大的启示性魔术戏法的导管。

spoiled_food.en: That used to be food until I wasted it.
spoiled_food.trans: 曾经是食物，直到我浪费了它。

generic.en: We've got a live one here.

long.en: It's going to be a while.

generic.en: Yuck.

critter_puppy.en: You're a slobbery little chap, aren't you?
critter_puppy.trans: 你是一个懒散的小家伙，不是吗？

sleep.en: I could have thought of that.

burning.en: I'm going to pretend I don't see it.

off.en: It's useless out here without power.

generic.en: I could have thought of that.

skeleton_notplayer.en: You're not of much use to me now, are you?
skeleton_notplayer.trans: 你现在对我没什么用了，不是吗？

boat_bumper_shell.en: Seashells. The sturdiest building material known to man.
boat_bumper_shell.trans: 贝壳。人类已知的最坚固的建筑材料。

quagmire_salt.en: Adding too much is an a-salt on the senses.
quagmire_salt.trans: 加太多盐就是对感官的“盐力”攻击。

chesspiece_moon.en: I'm fairly partial to this one.

farm_plow.en: Thankfully it seems capable of doing the work itself.
farm_plow.trans: 庆幸的是，它似乎能够自己干活。

birchnutdrake.en: A nut with legs! How terrifying!

slingshotammo_moonglass.en: Ah, now that might be interesting.

furtuft.en: Not quite enough for a rug.

polly_rogers.en: There will be no perching on my shoulder. Got that, pal?
polly_rogers.trans: 不准站在我肩膀上栖息。明白了吗，伙计？

perd.en: It is addicted to fermented berries.

construction1.en: I don't see why I must be the one to do all the work.
construction1.trans: 我就不明白了，为什么所有活都丢给我干。

construction2.en: How odd to be the one laboring on a machine for an unknown purpose...
construction2.trans: 在一台机器上漫无目的地挥洒汗水，太古怪了……

generic.en: That old fool...

chesspiece_beequeen.en: Does she really need a statue?

generic.en: It's leading us to something...

batnosehat.en: Do I have no dignity left?
batnosehat.trans: 这是要把我的尊严放在那里？

saddle_race.en: But is it fast enough to escape the judgmental stares?
saddle_race.trans: 但是它的速度会快到足以逃避指责的目光吗？

trident.en: It seems to have struck a chord.

pumpkincookie.en: It's been eons since I had a good biscuit.
pumpkincookie.trans: 我有几个世纪没吃过好吃的饼干了。

walkingplank_ancient.en: Jumping off would ruin what's left of my suit.
walkingplank_ancient.trans: 跳下去的话，我剩下的西装也会被泡坏。

moonrockcrater.en: This will make a decent magical vessel.
moonrockcrater.trans: 这会形成一个像样的魔法器皿。

malbatross.en: I've no desire to do battle with that thing.
malbatross.trans: 我可不想跟那个东西战斗。

book_gardening.en: It's not wise to toy with forces beyond your comprehension.
book_gardening.trans: 玩弄你无法理解的力量可不是明智之举。

generic.en: Apologies, Higgsbury. I thought that stench was coming from you.
generic.trans: 抱歉，希格斯伯里。我原以为那臭味是你身上的。

barnaclestuffedfishhead.trans: 我想现在什么都算“食物”了。

quagmire_altar_statue1.en: I do like a good statue.

spice_garlic.en: Keeps everyone from getting too close.

merm_toolshed.en: I'm certain there's nothing inside I'd want.
merm_toolshed.trans: 我确定里面没有我想要的东西。

shadow_forge_kit.en: There is work to be done.

generic.en: Yes. I desire the knowledge of the moon.
generic.trans: 不错，我渴望月亮的知识。

moon_altar_wip.en: There is powerful energy pouring out of it.

unhappy.en: It's going to wreak havoc on my world.
unhappy.trans: 它要在我的世界里横行肆虐。

veryhappy.trans: 我们已经暂时将它平息了。

generic.en: Have you no pride?

yotb_pattern_fragment_1.en: I'll have to combine them before they'll reveal their secrets.
yotb_pattern_fragment_1.trans: 我得把它们组合起来，这样它们才会吐露隐藏的秘密。

yotb_pattern_fragment_2.en: I'll have to combine them before they'll reveal their secrets.
yotb_pattern_fragment_2.trans: 我得把它们组合起来，这样它们才会吐露隐藏的秘密。

yotb_pattern_fragment_3.en: I'll have to combine them before they'll reveal their secrets.
yotb_pattern_fragment_3.trans: 我得把它们组合起来，这样它们才会吐露隐藏的秘密。

lavaarena_strongdamagerhat.en: I'd never wear such an undapper thing.
lavaarena_strongdamagerhat.trans: 这种完全不帅的东西，我绝不会戴。

wx78_moduleremover.trans: 那家伙脸皮跟钢铁一样厚。

inactive.en: It only half-exists on this plane.
inactive.trans: 它只有一半存在于这个位面。

active.en: I can see its true nature now!
active.trans: 终于看到它的本来面目了！

handpillow_kelp.en: Looking at it is making me seasick.
handpillow_kelp.trans: 光是看着它我都晕船了。

trap.en: Only the dumbest animals will fall for this.
trap.trans: 只有最蠢的动物才会掉进这个陷阱。

ruinshat.trans: 里面肯定有燃料在流动。

quagmire_berrybush.trans: 它们不会重新长出来了。

ghostlyelixir_shield.en: It appears someone has been toying with the dark arts and crafts.
ghostlyelixir_shield.trans: 看来有人在鼓捣黑暗魔法。

yotc_carrat_gym_stamina_item.en: I tire of lugging this around.

mosquitobomb.en: What sort of fiend would come up with this?
mosquitobomb.trans: 什么样的恶魔会想出这种主意？

generic.en: It smells of rot and failure.
generic.trans: 它闻起来充满了腐烂坏掉的味道。

generic.en: On or off? Make up your mind.

halloweenpotion_fire_fx.en: Might as well throw it in the fire.

nightlight.en: It burns with a beautiful glow.
nightlight.trans: 它点燃时发出美丽的光芒。

yotb.en: This might be of interest to the judge.
yotb.trans: 评委也许对这个感兴趣。

generic.en: I've no need for such things.

corn_seeds.trans: 这种低贱的活不适合我。

cactus_meat.en: It would be unwise to put that in my mouth.
cactus_meat.trans: 把这东西放进嘴里真是太不明智了。

slingshotammo_gelblob.en: Ah, now that might be interesting.

deck_of_cards.en: If only I stuck with these.
deck_of_cards.trans: 我当初一直玩这个就好了。

featherhat.en: I always considered myself the peacock of people.
featherhat.trans: 我一直觉得自己爱慕虚荣。

pocketwatch_dismantler.trans: 小巧的手工工具，多么古朴。

line_1.en: A picture of the city, before the fuel.
line_1.trans: 这座城市在燃料之前的画面。

line_2.en: We all know what happens next.
line_2.trans: 我们都知道接下来会发生什么。

line_3.en: They gained such an enviable power...
line_3.trans: 他们得到了令人羡慕的力量...

line_4.en: I know why you led me back here.
line_4.trans: 我知道你为什么带我回到这里。

cooldown.en: Best not to overuse this power.
cooldown.trans: 最好不要过度使用这个力量。

destabilizing.en: Now we've gone and done it.

charging.en: It is feeding off the dark energy.

on.en: This is a most wretched idea.

quagmire_mermhouse.en: The stinking abode of those filthy fish creatures.

generic.en: Hmph. I hope she appreciates this.

burning.en: Well. That was fun while it lasted.
burning.trans: 好吧，它烧起来很有意思。

generic.en: It's a piece of wood. What more is there to say?
generic.trans: 这是一块木材。还有什么要说的？

generic.en: You're new.

spider_repellent.en: If only loud noises were really enough to deter them.
spider_repellent.trans: 如果大声喧哗真的足以震慑它们，那就好了。

chesspiece_bearger_mutated.en: It'll scare away anyone with good taste.
chesspiece_bearger_mutated.trans: 这会吓跑任何有品味的人。

carnival_vest_c.en: It affords some protection from the sun's burning rays.
carnival_vest_c.trans: 它能在一定程度上保护人们免受太阳光的灼伤。

carnival_vest_b.en: At least it will give me some respite from this wretched heat.
carnival_vest_b.trans: 至少它能让我从这可恶的高温中得到一丝喘息。

waxpaper.en: My interest in this wax paper wanes....
waxpaper.trans: 我对这张蜡纸的兴趣消退了...

merm_lunar.en: They managed to get even uglier.
merm_lunar.trans: 它们成功的变得更丑了。

growing.en: It seems to be growing back...

mined_out.en: It's been mined down to nothing.

generic.en: Odd...

book_bees.en: Perhaps now the bees will serve me.
book_bees.trans: 也许现在蜜蜂将为我服务。

chopped.en: I put it out of its misery.
chopped.trans: 我让它从痛苦中解脱了。

generic.en: It looks sickly.

revealed.en: I thought I smelled something in the air. What are you peddling today?
revealed.trans: 我就说空气里有股什么味道。你今天又来贩什么了？

generic.en: It stinks more than usual.

mask_halfwithat.en: I'd prefer not to put that on my face.
mask_halfwithat.trans: 那玩意我就不往脸上挂了。

quagmire_turnip_seeds.en: Am I supposed to plant these?

gazpacho.en: It smells much nicer going in than coming back out.

archive_lockbox.en: Impossible... I thought I was privy to all of Their secrets.
archive_lockbox.trans: 不可能啊……我还以为我早已掌握他们所有的秘密。

carnival_vest_a.en: Far too jaunty for my taste.
carnival_vest_a.trans: 就我的口味而言，有些轻浮。

firestarter.en: Who allowed the ape to play with fire?!
firestarter.trans: 谁允许猿猴玩火的？

ghost.en: What a shame.
ghost.trans: 令人遗憾。

murderer.en: It's high time I put that creature down.
murderer.trans: 是时候消灭那畜生了。

reviver.en: At least the ape appears to be well trained.
reviver.trans: 看起来那猿猴受过良好的训练。

generic.en: What are you looking at, ape?

wx78module_maxhealth.en: That robot needs to pull themselves together.
wx78module_maxhealth.trans: 那个机器人需要把自己的零件都装好。

generic.en: Charmed, I'm sure.

wagstaff_mutations_note.en: What have we here? More of that lunacy?
wagstaff_mutations_note.trans: 这是什么？又是疯狂的月光之类的？

yotb_post_item.en: This seems like a dreadful amount of effort.
yotb_post_item.trans: 所需要的工作量令人绝望。

inspectself.en: I still look dapper, right? As if I need to check.
inspectself.trans: 我看起来还是风度翩翩，对吧？我得确认一下。

book_brimstone.en: I've had enough fire and brimstone for one eternity.
book_brimstone.trans: 我有一世用不尽的火和闪电。

klaus.en: My, what a magnificently horrific creature.
klaus.trans: 哎呀，多么壮观又可怕的生物啊。

glassed.en: I can feel its eye upon me... watching...
glassed.trans: 我能感到它的眼睛盯在我身上……一直盯着我……

cave.en: The cave provides sanctuary from the "moon's" prying eyes.
cave.trans: 这洞穴提供了一个远离“月亮”窥探的眼睛的避难所。

night_full.en: The "moon" is full in the sky.

generic.en: The gem conjures water springs in conjunction with the "moon's" cycles.
generic.trans: 这宝石结合“月亮”的周期对水泉施展魔法。

generic.en: Ah. The daily grind.

thulecite.en: An exceedingly rare but useful material.
thulecite.trans: 极其稀少却很有用的材料。

quagmire_rubble_roof.en: It's no longer over anyone's head.

generic.en: It's twisted and prickly, just like me!
generic.trans: 扭曲而扎人，就像我一样！

quagmire_grill_small.trans: 我更喜欢大一点的烧烤炉。

infused.trans: 嗯。这个也许能派上用场。

generic.en: It's been turned to glass.

succulent_potted.en: You're hard to kill. I respect that.
succulent_potted.trans: 你很难被杀死。我尊重它。

dug_sapling.en: I can't believe I'm reduced to this.
dug_sapling.trans: 我无法相信我竟然沦落到这般田地。

burnt.en: That's a bit burned for my taste.
burnt.trans: 就我的品味而言，它烧过头了。

generic.en: That's a bit rustic for my taste.
generic.trans: 就我的品味而言，它太土气了。

boat_grass_item.en: Am I building a boat or weaving a basket?
boat_grass_item.trans: 我是在造船还是在编花篮？

moonglassaxe.en: Go on. Axe me what the moon's made of.

bodypillow_petals.en: Can you rightfully call a sack of potpourri a pillow?
bodypillow_petals.trans: 你好意思管一袋干花叫枕头吗？

pocket_scale.en: I keep it next to my pocket watch and my pocket comb.
pocket_scale.trans: 我把它放在我的怀表和梳子旁边。

feather_robin_winter.en: Grey is the color of pain.

carnivaldecor_plant_kit.en: There's no end to the work around here, it seems.
carnivaldecor_plant_kit.trans: 这里的工作没有尽头，似乎是这样。

mermarmorupgradedhat.en: Does it look I have the bulbous head of a merm?
mermarmorupgradedhat.trans: 我的头看起来像鱼人的球型脑袋吗？

slingshot_frame_wagpunk_0.en: He'll shoot his eye out if he's not careful.
slingshot_frame_wagpunk_0.trans: 他一不小心就会把自己的眼睛打瞎。

quagmire_potato_cooked.en: The potato may be eaten now.

dreadstone_stack.en: It comes from the depths below.

quagmire_sapling.en: I don't have time to watch twigs grow.
quagmire_sapling.trans: 我可没时间盯着嫩苗长大。

klaus_sack.trans: 里面藏着什么样的黑暗财宝？

milkywhites.en: Nauseating. It must still contain some evil energy.
milkywhites.trans: 令人作呕。一定有邪恶的能量在里面。

picked.en: It's made of dirty beefalo hair.
picked.trans: 它是用肮脏的牛毛做成的。

generic.en: Well. That's tempting.

wx78module_bee.en: That robot needs to pull themselves together.
wx78module_bee.trans: 那个机器人需要把自己的零件都装好。

meat.en: I'm used to much finer fare.
meat.trans: 我过去吃得比这好多了。

generic.en: Now for some expert-level rummaging.
generic.trans: 现在该展示专家级的搜刮本领了。

rock_petrified_tree_old.en: I think it looks much better this way.
rock_petrified_tree_old.trans: 我觉得这样看起来更好。

generic.en: It appears to be a piece of drifted wood.

yots_worm.en: What are you doing up here?

desiccantboosted.en: A more robust ward against dampness.

honeynuggets.en: These look childish, but they're delicious.
honeynuggets.trans: 虽然看上去还没成形，但非常美味。

staff_lunarplant.en: More magic to add to the arsenal.
staff_lunarplant.trans: 给武器库里加入更多魔法。

messagebottle.en: Someone sensibly bottled up their feelings and tossed them out to sea.
messagebottle.trans: 有人理智的把感情装到了瓶子里，然后丢到了海里。

ghost.en: My, you're looking spirited today, %s.
ghost.trans: 我的天，%s，你今天看起来魂不守舍的。

firestarter.en: You were the last one I expected to start fires, %s.
firestarter.trans: 我万万没想到放火的会是你，%s。

murderer.en: You've engineered your own demise!
murderer.trans: 你招致了自己的灭亡！

attacker.en: %s has been roughhousing like a commoner.
attacker.trans: %s像个下人一样一直在喧闹打斗。

reviver.en: %s expertly uses all tools at her disposal.

generic.en: Greetings, Ms. %s.

yotc_carrat_gym_direction_item.trans: 我的胡萝卜鼠需要一些指示。

pomegranate.en: Usually I'd get someone to seed this for me.
pomegranate.trans: 通常我会找人来帮我播种。

fossil_piece.en: Perhaps it is best left in pieces.
fossil_piece.trans: 可能它最好就那样一直是碎片。

sharkboi.en: Who dreamed up this icy abomination?
sharkboi.trans: 是谁想出了这个冰冷的可憎之物？

guard.trans: 他们开始变得有组织性了。

generic.en: What a slobbering fool.
generic.trans: 真是个口水直流的傻瓜。

off.en: I'm partial to the lavender shade, myself.

on.en: A light to repel the encroaching shadow.
on.trans: 这道光可以驱走袭来的暗影。

ready.en: I need to insert the divining rod.

generic.en: It's the starting mechanism.

shroombait.trans: 应该让威尔逊试吃一下。

scrap_monoclehat.en: I don't need glasses! Who told you I need glasses?
scrap_monoclehat.trans: 我不需要眼镜！谁告诉你我需要眼镜了？

wilted.en: Every lovely flower must one day wilt.
wilted.trans: 每朵可爱的鲜花有一天都会枯萎。

freshlight.en: A temporary reprieve from the shadow.

oldlight.en: I believe it is Wilson's turn to fetch bulbs.
oldlight.trans: 我相信轮到威尔逊去拿灯泡了。

generic.en: Purely decorative.

empty.en: An empty vessel awaiting decoration or light.
empty.trans: 等待被装饰和照明的一个空器皿。

beequeenhivegrown.en: I don't see what all the buzz is about.
beequeenhivegrown.trans: 我不明白这样的嗡嗡叫是为了什么。

supertacklecontainer.en: Not the most refined design, but it's functional.
supertacklecontainer.trans: 虽然设计不够精致，但是很实用。

boat_bumper_kelp_kit.en: Ugh. These menial tasks do not suit me.
boat_bumper_kelp_kit.trans: 呃。这些琐碎的工作并不适合我。

beargerfur_sack.en: Portable indeed. Wilson can carry it.
beargerfur_sack.trans: 确实便携。让威尔逊扛吧。

moon_altar_idol.en: Let me know your wishes, and I will oblige.
moon_altar_idol.trans: 你的愿望是什么，我来帮你实现。

gestalt_guard_evolved.en: Oh, bygones be bygones and such.

spicepack.en: I've been reduced to hauling my own foodstuffs.
spicepack.trans: 我沦落到了自己做饭的田地。

fused_shadeling_bomb.trans: 好一条坚持不懈的尾巴。

dug_trap_starfish.en: What would be the most devilish place to put it?

comfy.en: I can say with pride that it is comfy and cozy.
comfy.trans: 我可以骄傲地说它很舒适惬意。

cold.en: I knew I would make a terrible pa-pa.

quagmire_tomato_cooked.en: It's a red, red roasted tomato.

deflated.en: Its power is spent. Now it's just garishly cheery.
deflated.trans: 它的力量已经耗尽。现在只剩下艳俗的欢乐。

generic.en: The mime's power unsettles me.
generic.trans: 这个小丑的力量让我感到不安。

some_kelp.en: Not enough? Where does it end?
some_kelp.trans: 还不够？什么时候是个头？

generic.en: The fishheads are out of salad.

lavae_cocoon.en: It's no threat in this state.
lavae_cocoon.trans: 这种状态下它不是个威胁。

dug_berrybush_juicy.en: I could find a much better place for it.
dug_berrybush_juicy.trans: 我可以给它安排个更好的地方。

diseasing.en: Looks a little off, if you ask me.

diseased.en: What has brought this blight upon my world?
diseased.trans: 是谁把疫病带到我这儿来的？

withered.en: You'd think grass could withstand this heat...
withered.trans: 本以为草是受得住这种高温的...

generic.en: Tufty.

wurt_swampitem_lunar.en: Stop mucking about with that lunar filth!
wurt_swampitem_lunar.trans: 别捣鼓那些月亮污物了！

quagmire_turnip.trans: 一个大大的球茎状萝卜。

generic.en: What an atrocious beast.
Surely someone else can do these menial tasks?
generic.trans: 这些琐碎的工作不能找别人来做吗？

empty.en: So I'm to traipse around looking for water, then?
empty.trans: 那我就得四处游走找水了？

generic.en: A little bit of protection.

monkey_smallhat.en: Ugh, it makes me look like a common deckhand.
monkey_smallhat.trans: 呃，这让我看起来像个普通的甲板工人。

boat_leak.en: Oh, great. Now we're going to drown.
boat_leak.trans: 这下好了。我们要溺水了。

dustmothden.en: So this is the source of the Thulecite... I must say, I'm underwhelmed.
dustmothden.trans: 原来这就是铥矿的来源……不得不说，我有点失望。

eggplant_seeds.trans: 这种低贱的活不适合我。

rainhat.en: Not the most dapper of hats, but quite necessary.
rainhat.trans: 不是最体面的帽子，但相当有必要拥有一顶。

reviving.en: Something has taken hold of it!

generic.en: Best to dispose of it, quickly.

smallmeat_dried.en: My teeth are getting too old for this.
smallmeat_dried.trans: 我的牙根本咬不动这个。

quagmire_swampig_house_rubble.en: It's been a long time since this stood properly.
quagmire_swampig_house_rubble.trans: 它已经很长时间状态不佳了。

lichen.trans: 这些菌类植物在陷落中逃过一劫。

talleggs.en: It's been a while since I've had a good Scotch egg.
talleggs.trans: 我已经太久没吃过一顿像样的苏格兰蛋了。

kitcoon_forest.en: What a pathetic little creature. It's encumbered by excess fur.
kitcoon_forest.trans: 多么可悲的小动物。它被多余的毛皮所困扰。

boatrace_seastack_monkey_throwable_deplo.en: A waypoint. Or perhaps a well-timed obstacle...
boatrace_seastack_monkey_throwable_deplo.trans: 既是航标，但取决于投放时机，也可以是障碍物……

fishingrod.en: I will eat for a lifetime.

book_tentacles.en: What horrors shall be summoned from the depths?
book_tentacles.trans: 会从地底召唤出什么恐怖的东西？

boatpatch_kelp.en: That won't keep the water at bay for long.
boatpatch_kelp.trans: 那东西没办法长久解决漏水。

burnt.trans: 应该找人好好打扫一下。

generic.en: Finally, someone who'll carry my things.
generic.trans: 终于有人替我拿东西了。

burning.en: I'm going to pretend I don't see it.

off.en: See? It wasn't so great after all.
off.trans: 看吧，我就说这东西其实一般。

generic.en: Where does she find the time to build all this.
I'm sure its tail grows back.
generic.trans: 我确信它的尾巴又长出来了。

dead.en: That is probably for the best.

sleeping.en: I don't desire to rouse it.

generic.en: If anything ever looked evil, it's that.

shieldofterror.en: At least dealing with that monstrosity was good for something.
shieldofterror.trans: 起码没白在怪物身上浪费功夫。

beefalowool.trans: 闻起来像牲口棚的味道。

wx78module_cold.en: That robot needs to pull themselves together.
wx78module_cold.trans: 那个机器人需要把自己的零件都装好。

yellowstaff.en: With a bigger gem it would be so much more powerful.
yellowstaff.trans: 有一个大点的宝石，它会强大得多。

stash_map.en: Now I suppose I'll have to go out and fetch what was stolen from me.
stash_map.trans: 还得我亲自出马去夺回从我身上偷走的东西。

line_2.en: I can only glean a hint of their meaning.
line_2.trans: 我只能参透一点它的含义。

line_3.trans: 这里这个符号一直在重复……

meat_dried.en: My teeth are getting too old for this.
meat_dried.trans: 我的牙根本咬不动这个。

pig_coin.en: Perfect. I'll try not to spend it all in one place.
pig_coin.trans: 完美。我尽量不把钱花在一个地方。

fishingnet.en: Not my preferred way to ensnare enemies.
fishingnet.trans: 我一般不用这种手段诱捕敌人。

burnt.en: It's of no use to me like this.
burnt.trans: 这个样子对我是没用了。

generic.en: It's ready.

empty.en: It requires an offering.
empty.trans: 需要供品。

playing_hideandseek.en: They are not here, they are out hiding.
playing_hideandseek.trans: 它们不在这，都藏起来了。

playing_hideandseek_time_almost_up.en: We are nearly out of time to find all of the rascals.
playing_hideandseek_time_almost_up.trans: 我们就快没时间找到所有的捣蛋鬼了。

generic.en: A house for kitcoons? Can the pitiful little things not climb trees yet?
generic.trans: 小浣猫的房子吗？这些可怜的小东西还不会爬树吗？

bunnystew.trans: 直到最后一刻都在跳吧。

quagmire_garlic_seeds.en: Am I supposed to plant these?

kitcoondecor2_kit.en: Physical labor is what underlings are for.
kitcoondecor2_kit.trans: 下属存在就是为了做体力劳动。

oceantreenut.en: I have no interest in lugging that thing around. Back in the drink you go.
oceantreenut.trans: 我没有兴趣拖着那东西到处跑。你还是回到酒里去吧。

petals.en: I've a habit of destroying beautiful things, don't I?
petals.trans: 我有摧毁美丽事物的习惯，不是吗？

moonbutterflywings.en: What am I supposed to do with these?

blowdart_fire.en: Just make sure to breathe out.

gelblob_bottle.en: Wilson can take it on a picnic.
gelblob_bottle.trans: 威尔逊可以带上它去野餐。

generic.en: Great.

empty.en: Charcoal? How imaginative.
empty.trans: 木炭？太有想象力了。

generic.en: It seems our actions have been noticed.
generic.trans: 我们的行为似乎引起了别人的注意。

quagmire_key.en: And they thought their things were safe.
quagmire_key.trans: 他们还以为自己的物品安全得很呢。

dead.en: Come on now. You're not fooling anyone.

generic.en: It toys with us.

chesspiece_eyeofterror.en: An eye could never best a master of illusion such as I.
chesspiece_eyeofterror.trans: 一颗眼球而已，无法胜过像我这样的幻觉大师。

quagmire_garlic_cooked.en: I wonder if it still wards away the undead.
quagmire_garlic_cooked.trans: 不知道它还能不能驱走亡灵。

home.trans: 没有什么地方比家里更好。

burnt.en: Let's see you hide in there now.
burnt.trans: 现在看你还躲不躲在那里。

generic.en: It is not a sound structure.

full.en: I'd go inside too, if I was him.
full.trans: 如果我是他，我也会进去的。

generic.en: It can dry meats so they'll last longer.
generic.trans: 它可以把肉晾干，以便保存更长时间。

burnt.en: It's too brittle to hang meat on now.
burnt.trans: 它现在太脆弱了，没办法挂肉。

wx78_scanner_item.en: Something about it is just so temptingly kickable.
wx78_scanner_item.trans: 不知怎地，忍不住想踢它一脚。

feather_robin.en: Red is the color of fire.

tomato_seeds.en: Am I supposed to plant these?

alterguardian_phase3.en: At last you reveal your true self.
alterguardian_phase3.trans: 总算露出了你的本来面目。

kitcoon_grass.en: What a pathetic little creature. Just looking at it makes me itch.
kitcoon_grass.trans: 多么可悲的小动物。光是看着它，我就浑身痒痒了。

moon_altar_link.en: Events have been set into motion...
moon_altar_link.trans: 一切都安排的明明白白……

yoth_knightstick.en: But I still have to use my own legs?
yoth_knightstick.trans: 所以还是得靠我这双腿自己走？

icehat.en: Strap some ice on your head.
icehat.trans: 将一些冰戴在你的脑袋上。

quagmire_tomato_seeds.en: Am I supposed to plant these?

relic.trans: 已经湮灭的文明的遗迹。

ghostlyelixir_fastregen.en: It appears someone has been toying with the dark arts and crafts.
ghostlyelixir_fastregen.trans: 看来有人在鼓捣黑暗魔法。

turf_carpetfloor2.en: What was wrong with my carpet?

generic.en: Yes, fine. It's nice.

armorwagpunk.en: What it lacks in style it almost makes up for in pure, stubborn resilience.
armorwagpunk.trans: 风格上乏善可陈，但是极具韧性。

rope_bridge_kit.en: Ugh. You have to build it?!

lavaarena_boarlord.en: You seem severely deluded, good sir.
lavaarena_boarlord.trans: 你似乎深受迷惑啊，这位先生。

bomb_lunarplant_wormwood.trans: 它的力量已经被放大了……

yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint.en: These posts will serve as adequate route markers.
yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint.trans: 这些柱子会是很好的路线标识。

wagpunkhat.en: This machine really thinks it can tell me what to do?
wagpunkhat.trans: 这机器还给我指手画脚了？

hermithouse_laundry.en: We're getting really comfortable around here.
hermithouse_laundry.trans: 看来我们已经在这里待得相当自在了。

poweroff.en: I always wondered where those parts came from.
poweroff.trans: 我一直想搞清楚这些零件是从哪来的。

generic.en: Ah. I suppose I misinterpreted the original design.
generic.trans: 啊。看来我误解了它的设计意图。

generic.en: How long has that old fool been hiding his trash here?!
generic.trans: 那个老傻瓜在这里藏了多久垃圾了？！

steelwool.en: Someone should use this to clean something.

generic.en: Better him in that bowl than me.
generic.trans: 他在碗里总比我在碗里好。

hermitcrabtea_tillweed.en: Why do healthy things always taste so... healthy.
hermitcrabtea_tillweed.trans: 为什么健康饮品尝起来总是这么……健康。

oceanfishingbobber_robin_winter.en: I used to see quill floats like this back in England.
oceanfishingbobber_robin_winter.trans: 我在英国的时候见过这种浮在海里的羽毛。

dreadstonehat.en: Darkness is never far from my mind.
dreadstonehat.trans: 黑暗从未远离过我的脑海。

accomplishment_shrine.en: Even They couldn't build something so devious.
accomplishment_shrine.trans: 即使是他们，也造不出如此阴险的东西。

californiaroll.en: I don't think I truly appreciated those sunny shores.
californiaroll.trans: 我从未喜欢过所谓的阳光海岸。

armorslurper.trans: 又湿又闷，填充材料也很怪。

yotb.en: This might be of interest to the judge.
yotb.trans: 评委也许对这个感兴趣。

generic.en: I've no need for such things. Perhaps one of the children might take it.
generic.trans: 这种东西我不需要。也许那些小孩儿想要它。

houndmound.en: It's a tunnel down to the hounds' nest.
houndmound.trans: 这底下有个隧道通往猎犬的巢穴。

mutatedbearger.en: It's even more brutish than before.

book_fish.en: I suppose I'll eat for a lifetime, then? Somehow I doubt it.
book_fish.trans: 看来我要吃一辈子了？不知为何，我有些怀疑。

dragonchilisalad.en: I'll permit him to stay so long as he keeps cooking.
dragonchilisalad.trans: 只要他一直做饭，我就允许他待着。

turnip_seeds.en: Am I supposed to plant these?

generic.en: The top of this lava pit has cooled into a fine crust.
generic.trans: 这个熔岩坑的顶部已冷却成一层薄壳了。

scandata.en: Well... fine. I suppose that sums it all up, more or less.
scandata.trans: 这……好吧。看来差不多就那样了。

wagstaff_tool_1.en: Hmph. So I'm to fetch his tools for him now?
wagstaff_tool_1.trans: 哼，现在要使唤我帮他取工具了？

wagstaff_tool_2.en: I suppose that must be what he's looking for.
wagstaff_tool_2.trans: 我猜那个就是他在找的东西。

butterflywings.en: Ha ha ha. I got him!

armor_sanity.en: Wrap yourself in the nightmare. Embrace it.
armor_sanity.trans: 把自己包裹在噩梦中。拥抱它吧。

wagstaff_tool_3.en: Finally. That must be what he's looking for.
wagstaff_tool_3.trans: 总算找到了。那个一定是他在找的东西。

wagstaff_tool_4.en: Is this what he wants? Why couldn't that old fool have been more descriptive?!
wagstaff_tool_4.trans: 那就是他要找的吗？那个老傻瓜为什么不说清楚点？！

wagstaff_tool_5.en: Could this be what he's looking for?
wagstaff_tool_5.trans: 这个会是他想找的东西吗？

panettone.trans: 水果蛋糕更讨人喜欢的表哥。

generic.en: Flower power.

wx78module_maxhealth2.en: That robot needs to pull themselves together.
wx78module_maxhealth2.trans: 那个机器人需要把自己的零件都装好。

slingshotammo_stinger.en: Ah, now that might be interesting.

steeringwheel_item.en: Hard labor? Isn't that Winona's forte?
steeringwheel_item.trans: 干苦力？去找薇诺娜啊，找我干吗？

book_fire.en: Ah. Based on the librarian's own observations, I take it?
book_fire.trans: 啊。看来是基于图书管理员自身的观察写出的？

quagmire_onion_seeds.en: Am I supposed to plant these?

cactus_flower.en: This part of the cactus is always nice.
cactus_flower.trans: 仙人掌的这部分总是很不错。

wall_stone.en: This will keep the riff-raff out.
wall_stone.trans: 那些乌合之众再也进不来了。

goose_feather.en: I could use a pillow filled with these.

generic.en: I'm appalled by the idea of sitting for some reason.
generic.trans: 出于某种原因，我对坐下的想法感到震惊。

glassblock.en: Not the castle I had in mind for myself.
glassblock.trans: 这不是我为自己设想的城堡。

generic.en: The show must go on.

armor_lunarplant_husk.en: Of course the plant saves the best stuff for himself.
armor_lunarplant_husk.trans: 果然，那植物把最好的东西留给他自己。

bunnyman.en: It reminds me of my old act.
bunnyman.trans: 这让我想起了我的旧行当。

generic.en: It's fine.

burnt.en: The rain did not come in time.
burnt.trans: 那时候没有一场及时雨。

generic.en: I could just look up and learn the same thing.
generic.trans: 我只要抬头看看天，就可以了解到同样的信息。

lavaarena_armormedium.en: It offers a serviceable amount of protection.

frozenbananadaiquiri.en: There are better beverages to make.
frozenbananadaiquiri.trans: 什么饮料不能做偏要做这个。

spiderhat.trans: 蜘蛛的意志力真是太不坚定了。

beefalofeed.en: I suppose I'd better keep the stupid beast fed.
beefalofeed.trans: 我还是喂饱那头愚蠢的动物吧。

chum.en: Say, that chum doesn't look so good.

lunarthrall_plant_vine_end.en: Some aggressive pruning might be in order.

nightcaphat.en: I can't remember the last time I slept well.
nightcaphat.trans: 记不起上次睡的这么好是什么时候了。

diseasing.en: Looks a little off, if you ask me.
diseasing.trans: 如果你问我，我会说看起来有点儿失水准。

diseased.en: What has brought this blight upon my world?
diseased.trans: 是谁把疫病带到我这儿来的？

withered.trans: 没有东西能在热浪中幸免于难。

generic.en: A supple, woody stem.

punchingbag.en: A crude test of my weapons' power.
punchingbag.trans: 对我的武器来说是一种十分原始的测试。

hermitcrabtea_firenettles.en: Charlie always complained about being cold. Sigh.

carnivaldecor_figure_kit_season2.en: Curiosity always seems to get the better of me.
carnivaldecor_figure_kit_season2.trans: 我总是被好奇心牵着走。

costume_mirror_body.en: It seems the costumes are provided.

sweatervest.en: It's no three-piece, but it's dapper enough.
sweatervest.trans: 虽然不是三件套，但足够体面。

almost_done_cooking.en: I do wish it would hurry up.

generic.en: Something about it... ah, I'm sure it's nothing.
Er... charming.
What do you have in store for me?

empty.en: It requires an offering.
empty.trans: 需要供品。

moonstorm_static_roamer.trans: 嗯，跟寻常的魔法不太一样。

oceanfishingbobber_none.en: It seems to be missing something.

generic.en: I've lost my way.

lavaarena_armormediumrecharger.en: Decent protection that will enhance my power.
lavaarena_armormediumrecharger.trans: 保护力不错，能增加我的力量。

oceanfishinglure_spinner_red.en: At least I don't have to use worms.

farm_plow_item.en: Some kind of farming implement? I've no interest in such things.
farm_plow_item.trans: 这是农具？我对这些玩意没兴趣。

livingtree_sapling.trans: 再过几天就是可怕的日子了。

charging.en: It feels good to have control, doesn't it?
charging.trans: 掌控一切的感觉很棒，不是吗？

charged.en: It feels good to have control, doesn't it?
charged.trans: 掌控一切的感觉很棒，不是吗？

generic.en: It feels good to have control, doesn't it?
generic.trans: 掌控一切的感觉很棒，不是吗？

off.en: It's useless out here without power.

corn_oversized.en: That's far too much corn for any reasonable person.
corn_oversized.trans: 对于任何理智的人来说，玉米都实在太多了。

hermitcrabtea_forgetmelots.en: It certainly shakes out the cobwebs.
hermitcrabtea_forgetmelots.trans: 确实能抖掉脑子里的蜘蛛网。

pumpkin_lantern.trans: 哎呀，你好，无头骑士先生。

lavaarena_healingflowerhat.trans: 这种恢复活力的能量，我用得上。

shellweaver.en: It may just manage to make something useful.
shellweaver.trans: 它兴许真能做出点有用的东西来。

inactive.en: There are two ways to see that obstacle.
inactive.trans: 有两种方法可以看到那个障碍物。

active.en: I can see its true nature now!
active.trans: 我现在可以看到它真正的样子了！

merm.en: They were already here when I arrived.
merm.trans: 我到这里的时候他们已经在这了。

slingshotammo_horrorfuel.en: Ah, now that might be interesting.

oceanfishingrod.en: A more in-depth approach to fishing.

balloonhat.en: Would I really stoop so low as to wear such a thing?
balloonhat.trans: 我真的要掉价穿这种东西吗？

generic.en: It's ugly.

activated.en: Bug off! Ugh, I sound like Wilson.
activated.trans: 滚开！呃，我听起来怎么像威尔逊怎么了。

rock_avocado_fruit_sprout.en: How off-putting. It's grown a sprout.

carnivaldecor_banner.en: Oh good. Wouldn't want anyone thinking we've got taste around here, would we?
carnivaldecor_banner.trans: 呵呵，彻底放弃对品位的追求了？

portablefirepit_item.en: Fire on demand? I may have underestimated the young tree trooper.
portablefirepit_item.trans: 随时生火？我可能低估了那个年轻的树战士。

backpack.en: I wish there were porters around here.
backpack.trans: 我希望这附近有搬运工。

wagpunk_lever.en: No good will come of this!

generic.en: This earthen beast's all fired up.

fence.en: My life is one obstacle after another.
fence.trans: 我的人生就是一个接一个的障碍物。

pumpkin.trans: 万圣节始终是我的最爱。

wx78module_maxsanity1.en: That robot needs to pull themselves together.
wx78module_maxsanity1.trans: 那个机器人需要把自己的零件都装好。

hambat.en: An undignified weapon for a less refined time.
hambat.trans: 一件不太庄重的武器，适合不太讲究的时候。

pumpkin_seeds.trans: 这种低贱的活不适合我。

slingshot_band_mimic.en: He'll shoot his eye out if he's not careful.
slingshot_band_mimic.trans: 他一不小心就会把自己的眼睛打瞎。

diseased.en: What has brought this blight upon my world?
diseased.trans: 是谁把疫病带到我这儿来的？

chopped.en: That's not about to grow back.

generic.en: The tree of an amateur.

book_silviculture.en: It's not wise to toy with forces beyond your comprehension.
book_silviculture.trans: 使用你还没理解的力量不是明智之举。

exposed.en: That stone would be useful, if only it could be broken.
exposed.trans: 那块石头应该有点用，要是能打破它就好了。

generic.en: I can just make out something dark within.
generic.trans: 我能辨认出里面有黑暗的东西。

webberskull.en: Reminds me of the good ol' days.
webberskull.trans: 让我想起了那些美好的旧时光。

chesspiece_antlion.en: Is there a sinkhole I can bury this in?
chesspiece_antlion.trans: 我可以找个坑把它埋了吗？

wagboss_robot_constructionsite.en: Don't say I didn't warn you.

lunar_seed.en: I told you it was no match for my abilities.
lunar_seed.trans: 我早说过它敌不过我的能力。

beeguard.en: Keep your backside to yourself, madam!

generic.en: I never cared for woodworking. The sawdust gets everywhere.
generic.trans: 我从来都没喜欢过木工。锯末飞得到处都是。

wormwood_mutantproxy_lightflier.en: Finally, a mutation that's actually useful.
wormwood_mutantproxy_lightflier.trans: 终于有个能派上用场的变异生物了。

blowdart_lava2.trans: 我不是一个很能吹的人。

plantregistryhat.en: I'm really supposed to put that contraption on my head?
plantregistryhat.trans: 我真的要把那个装置戴在头上？

generic_largestack.en: Oh good. Now I can get some useless trinket from the Prize Booth.
generic_largestack.trans: 好呀。这下我能去奖品摊换点没用的饰品了。

generic_smallstack.en: I don't know why I'm dedicating so much time to this.
generic_smallstack.trans: 我不知道我为什么要花这么多时间在这上面。

generic.en: A prize ticket. How exciting.

held.en: You can't escape my villainous grasp!

generic.en: How wretchedly graceful.

costume_doll_body.en: It seems the costumes are provided.

burnt.en: Well, it burns just as well as the pigs' version.
burnt.trans: 嗯，这屋子像猪屋一样烧掉了。

generic.en: They copied the pigs, but they're even less intelligent.
generic.trans: 他们照搬了猪屋的设计，但他们甚至还没有猪聪明。

oceanfishinglure_hermit_snow.en: Why would anyone want to fish while it's snowing?

uncovered.en: Why would anyone want to cover this up?
uncovered.trans: 为什么会有人想把这东西盖起来？

ready.en: We'll get you out in a tick, friend.
ready.trans: 我们一会儿就会让你出来，朋友。

covered.en: Some truly questionable taste in decor.

finished.trans: 难道现在没有觉得好多了吗？

spore_moon.en: It reminds me of those infernal balloons.
spore_moon.trans: 这让我想起了那些烈狱气球。

generic.en: The writing is too faint to read.

turf_carpetfloor.en: That's a quality, high-pile carpet sample!
turf_carpetfloor.trans: 这是一块高品质长毛绒地毯的样品！

held.en: It would be a shame if someone ripped the wings off of it.
held.trans: 如果有人把它翅膀扯掉就可惜了。

generic.en: It's a flying flower.
How repulsively festive.

quagmire_rubble_chimney2.en: Nobody has kept up with repairs.

oceanfishinglure_spoon_red.en: At least I don't have to use worms.

chesspiece_deerclops_mutated.en: I take great offense to anyone trying to improve on my designs.
chesspiece_deerclops_mutated.trans: 如果有人试图改进我的设计，我会非常生气。

slingshotammo_container.en: Hope he'll pick up after himself more.
slingshotammo_container.trans: 希望他多收纳一下自己的东西。

eggplant_cooked.en: A little more refined, at least.

wagboss_robot_secret.en: Nothing but trouble under there if you ask me.
wagboss_robot_secret.trans: 要我说，下面除了麻烦什么也没有。

moon_altar_ward.en: I'll take you to the others.

ancienttree_sapling_item.en: I suppose I have no choice but to get my hands dirty.
ancienttree_sapling_item.trans: 看来我别无选择，只能弄脏手了。

chesspiece_depthworm.trans: 这个还是长留地下为好。

slingshotammo_dreadstone.en: Ah, now that might be interesting.

uncovered.en: Come now! I liked that one.

ready.en: We'll get you out in a tick, friend.
ready.trans: 我们一会儿就会让你出来，朋友。

covered.en: Hmph. I was never a fan of the Grecian look.
covered.trans: 哼...我从来不喜欢希腊人的长相。

rock_avocado_fruit.en: I'd rather not shatter my teeth on that.

dragonfruit_seeds.trans: 这种低贱的活不适合我。

generic.en: How whimsical.

quagmire_slaughtertool.en: I don't mind getting my hands dirty with this.
quagmire_slaughtertool.trans: 我不介意它弄脏我的手。

rottenegg.trans: 恶心。为什么还留着这个？

critter_lamb.trans: 不要再轻轻地咬我燕尾服的燕尾了。

snurtle.en: That's strange. They must be new.
snurtle.trans: 好奇怪。它们肯定是新来的。

alterguardian_phase3deadorb.en: This power, it feels like... but it couldn't be...
alterguardian_phase3deadorb.trans: 这种力量感觉起来……可是不应该啊……

oceanfishinglure_hermit_drowsy.en: I think Higgsbury already got too close to one of these.
oceanfishinglure_hermit_drowsy.trans: 我想希格斯伯里曾经靠近过这个。

generic.en: What's that rock doing up there?
generic.trans: 那块石头在上面做什么？

oceanwhirlportal.en: Is it safe? We should send Wilson in first.
oceanwhirlportal.trans: 它安全吗？咱们先把威尔逊送进去。

stalker_atrium.en: The Atrium's power restored his mind.
stalker_atrium.trans: 中庭的力量修复了他的心神。

bishop.en: I'm especially proud of that piece.
bishop.trans: 我对那件作品感到特别自豪。

wilted.en: Every lovely flower must one day wilt.
wilted.trans: 每朵可爱的鲜花有一天都会枯萎。

freshlight.en: A temporary reprieve from the shadow.

oldlight.en: I believe it is Wilson's turn to fetch bulbs.
oldlight.trans: 我相信轮到威尔逊去拿灯泡了。

generic.en: Purely decorative.

empty.en: An empty vessel awaiting decoration or light.
empty.trans: 等待被装饰和照明的一个空器皿。

generic.en: Hm. I have a bad feeling...
Hm?
No, go on, keep playing that same note. It's not irritating at all.
generic.trans: 没事，你继续，就一直演奏那一个音。一点都不讨厌。

generic.en: I've quite lost my taste for music.
generic.trans: 我那点音乐品味都快丢完了。

yotd_steeringwheel.en: That's the place for the person in charge. Me.
yotd_steeringwheel.trans: 那个位置属于掌舵者，非我莫属。

flotationcushion.en: Where does it say, "women and children first"?
flotationcushion.trans: “妇女儿童优先”的标示印在哪了？

wobster_sheller.en: I'd prefer it without the sharp, pinching claws.
wobster_sheller.trans: 要是没有锋利夹人的钳子就好了。

chopped.trans: 已经有人先把它砍倒了。

generic.en: It's a moon tree.

slurtlehat.en: This will keep me standing, if I need to fight.
slurtlehat.trans: 在需要战斗时，它可以防止我倒下。

seeds.en: I suppose these won't plant themselves.
seeds.trans: 我想这些东西不会把自己种下去。

carnivaldecor_banner_kit.en: There's no end to the work around here, it seems.
carnivaldecor_banner_kit.trans: 这里的工作没有尽头，似乎是这样。

pig_token.en: Those pigs are getting more and more clever.

generic.en: I suppose it's a type of magic.

picked.en: It's as hollow as this withered world.
picked.trans: 它是空心的，就像这个衰败的世界一样。

generic.en: I could, perhaps, produce a makeshift garnish.
generic.trans: 也许我可以做一个凑合能用的装饰。

imprisoned.en: You went nosing around places you shouldn't have, didn't you?
imprisoned.trans: 你闯进了不该去的地方，不是吗？

generic.en: Say pal, why don't we talk this out?
generic.trans: 伙计，我们有话好好说行吗？

generic.en: Thank goodness, I thought it was another wretched statue of me.
generic.trans: 谢天谢地，我觉得它是另一个可怜的我。

empty.en: The fewer statues the better, I say.
empty.trans: 我说，雕像越少越好。

archive_centipede.en: I get the sensation that we are not welcome here.
archive_centipede.trans: 我有种感觉，我们在这里不受欢迎。

feather_canary.en: Yellow is the color of naivety.
feather_canary.trans: 黄色是天真烂漫的颜色。

valid.en: It saps power from the gems.

gems.en: I suppose I'll need to find a suitable gem.
gems.trans: 应该要找到一颗合适的宝石。

mastupgrade_lamp_item.en: Far more practical than setting a fire on our boat.
mastupgrade_lamp_item.trans: 远比在我们的船上放火实用多了。

gestalt_guard.en: I think it would be best to keep my distance.

dragonboat_kit.en: I'm not the roll-up-your-sleeves type. Ask the handywoman.
dragonboat_kit.trans: 我可不是撸起袖子干活的人。找女工人去。

yoth_chair_rocking_item.en: Amusing, perhaps. Still the thought of sitting...
yoth_chair_rocking_item.trans: 也许挺有趣。不过一想到要坐着……

firestarter.en: The next fire you start will be a funeral pyre.
firestarter.trans: 你下一次是点的火是火葬的柴堆。

ghost.en: Do you desire a heart, %s?
ghost.trans: %s，你想要心吗？
