murderer.en: Bloodthirsty warrior! This ends now!
murderer.trans: 杀人不眨眼的战士！现在该结束了！

reviver.en: %s has excellent command of the spirit realm.

generic.en: Greetings, Ms. %s.

antliontrinket.en: I'll cross it off my bucket list.
antliontrinket.trans: 我会把它从我的遗愿清单里划掉。

match_but_snack.en: Well, I suppose it will tide the wyrm over.
match_but_snack.trans: 嗯，我想它会让大蛇满足一阵子的。

match.en: This is exactly what the wyrm wants.

generic.en: Let's see how the wyrm likes this.
generic.trans: 让我们看看大蛇喜不喜欢它。

burnt.en: Someone finally took care of that hideous throw rug.
burnt.trans: 终于有人解决了那块破地毯。

generic.en: Not especially impressive for a "throne".

done.trans: 终于有一些美食出炉了。

burnt.en: A bit overdone for my tastes.
burnt.trans: 就我的口味而言，它烧过头了。

empty.en: Just the thought makes my mouth water.
empty.trans: 想一想都让我流口水。

costume_queen_body.en: It seems the costumes are provided.

mermguard_lunar.en: They managed to get even uglier.
mermguard_lunar.trans: 它们成功的变得更丑了。

armordreadstone.en: Black never goes out of style.

yotb_sewingmachine_item.en: Why must these things come unassembled?
yotb_sewingmachine_item.trans: 为什么不组装好再给我？

onion_seeds.en: Am I supposed to plant these?

full_oversized.en: At last, my efforts are rewarded.
full_oversized.trans: 我的努力总算得到了回报。

rotten_oversized.en: It's no good to anyone now.
rotten_oversized.trans: 它现在对任何人都没有用了。

generic.en: Merely a plant.

full.en: It's time to reap what I've sown.
full.trans: 是时候收割我种下的种子了。

playbill_the_doll.en: I think she's enjoying this a bit too much.

ancientfruit_gem.en: I sense magic at its core. Now, how to get it out...
ancientfruit_gem.trans: 我感受到了它内核的魔法。所以如何把它弄出来呢……

berries_juicy.en: Delightfully sweet with a subtle hint of tartness.
berries_juicy.trans: 令人愉悦的香味带着淡淡的辣味。

generic.en: How do these things keep getting into my world?
generic.trans: 这些东西是怎么不断进入我的世界的？

armorruins.en: Thulecite meshes so well with nightmare fuel.
armorruins.trans: 铥矿与噩梦燃料结合得如此完美。

generic.en: Bloody bloodsucking bloodsuckers.

ready.en: So tempting, but so full of bees.
ready.trans: 真诱人，但是蜜蜂太多了。

somehoney.en: I should wait a bit longer.

fullhoney.en: So tempting, but so full of bees.
fullhoney.trans: 真诱人，但是蜜蜂太多了。

generic.en: It holds the bees.

nohoney.en: Why do the bees not serve me?
nohoney.trans: 为什么蜜蜂不为我服务？

spiderden_bedazzler.en: Careful child, it's a slippery slope towards a career in the arts.
spiderden_bedazzler.trans: 小心了，孩子，这是条通往艺术职业的下坡路。

oceanfish_medium_9.en: It seems we share an appreciation for figs.
oceanfish_medium_9.trans: 看来你跟我一样喜欢无花果。

oceanfish_medium_8.trans: 你就继续冷若冰霜吧，伙计。

balloons_empty.en: Those look much too jovial for my liking.
balloons_empty.trans: 那些看起来太快活了，符合我的胃口。

glassspike.en: I hope I'm not so transparent.
glassspike.trans: 我希望我不是透明的玻璃心。

oceanfish_medium_4.en: I'm not sure it was worth the effort.
oceanfish_medium_4.trans: 我不确定值不值得这样做。

oceanfish_medium_3.en: I'd best take care to avoid those spines.
oceanfish_medium_3.trans: 我最好不要碰它的鳍刺。

oceanfish_medium_2.en: It has a rather unsettling stare.

wathgrithr_shield.trans: 她一反常态地务实了一回。

petrified_tree.en: I think it looks much better this way.
petrified_tree.trans: 我觉得这样看起来更好。

seedpouch.en: One more thing to lug from place to place.

blowdart_yellow.en: Never strikes the same place twice, except when it does.
blowdart_yellow.trans: 永远不要攻击同一个地方两次，除非当它出击了两次。

lightflier.en: Finally, a mutation that's actually useful.
lightflier.trans: 终于有个能派上用场的变异生物了。

generic.en: That... looks like it would hurt.

quagmire_potato.en: It is in the nightshade family, you know.

lavaarena_healinggarlandhat.trans: 以花环的形式自给自足。

moonstaff.en: The staff is powered by the "moon's" energy.
moonstaff.trans: 魔杖的能量来源于“月亮”的能量。

staffed.en: Something magic-y needs to happen, I think.
staffed.trans: 我认为需要发生不可思议的事情。

generic.en: I had thought these all destroyed eons ago.
generic.trans: 我以为所有这些在好几个年代以前已经被摧毁了。

bedroll_furry.en: At least they're good for something.

generic.en: If it saves me from having to row myself, I'll give it a chance.
generic.trans: 如果它能让我不用自己划船，我倒是可以试一下。

farm_hoe.en: Am I to be reduced to a common farmhand?
farm_hoe.trans: 难道我就要沦为一个普通的佃农吗？

phlegm.en: I need to put on gloves for this.

rook_nightmare.en: The builders have left it in a state of abandonment.

chesspiece_twinsofterror.en: The most troublesome pair I've ever seen.
chesspiece_twinsofterror.trans: 这是我见过的最麻烦的一对。

worm.en: I didn't make that one! Honest!

mooseegg.en: Ride the lightning, you big egg.
mooseegg.trans: 驾着闪电而来？你这个大鸟蛋。

batbat.trans: 暴力从未让人感觉如此之爽。

carnivaldecor_plant.en: At least it's small and somewhat manageable.

hungry.en: What's all the fuss about, feathers?

starving.en: Oh, come on. I fed you last week.
starving.trans: 哦，别这样，我上周才喂过你。

generic.en: You'll never get me behind bars again.
generic.trans: 你们再也不能将我重新关进牢笼。

occupied.trans: 我了解你的心情，长羽毛的小家伙。

sleeping.en: You'll still be in there when you wake up.
sleeping.trans: 当你醒来的时候，你还是在那里面。

fish_box.en: Ugh, the smell... the things I do for a decent meal.
fish_box.trans: 额，这鱼腥味……我为了吃点好的也算豁出去了。

held.en: I've caught a tiger by the tail.

generic.en: What is that bee so angry about?
generic.trans: 那只蜜蜂为什么如此生气？

chesspiece_daywalker2.trans: 啊，是那头乱翻东西的猪啊。

bloom.en: I hope I'm not standing next to it when it goes off.
bloom.trans: 当它爆炸时，希望我不要站在旁边。

generic.en: Where's Waldo?

featherpencil.en: Not as elegant as a quill and inkwell, but it'll do.
featherpencil.trans: 不像羽毛笔和墨水瓶一样优雅，但凑活能用。

yotb.en: This might be of interest to the judge.
yotb.trans: 评委也许对这个感兴趣。

generic.en: I've no need for such things.

beast_blueprint.en: I'd say luck is in rather short supply around here.
beast_blueprint.trans: 我想说，这里缺的就是运气。

generic.en: This place is infested with those monkey miscreants.
generic.trans: 这个地方充斥着恶棍猴子。

burning.en: I'm going to pretend I don't see it.

off.en: Magic isn't so easy, is it?

generic.en: At least she has the sense to use gems.

lavaarena_armor_hp.en: A little extra armor never hurt.
lavaarena_armor_hp.trans: 外加一副小盔甲也无妨。

book_sleep.en: I haven't had a real sleep in... ages.
book_sleep.trans: 我很久没有好好睡一觉了。

critter_bulbin.en: You're not from around here, are you pal?

venting.en: Ugh, I think I swallowed some.

generic.en: Leave me alone!

saddle_basic.en: But that means I'd have to touch the smelly thing.
saddle_basic.trans: 但是那意味着我得摸这臭东西。

recharging.en: It looks like she'll have to wait, for once.

generic.en: Careful, madam. I know where this trail ultimately leads.
generic.trans: 小心点，夫人。我知道这条路通向哪里。

lunarplant_kit.trans: 有些东西是可以修复的。

playing.en: I'll play it, but I won't enjoy it.
playing.trans: 好，我玩，但我不会享受它。

generic.en: It requires payment.

mask_sagehat.en: I'd prefer not to put that on my face.
mask_sagehat.trans: 那玩意我就不往脸上挂了。

held.en: You thought you could fool me?

generic.en: That carrot is revolting!

book_horticulture_upgraded.en: Hopefully this will mean less time relegated to the garden.
book_horticulture_upgraded.trans: 有了它以后希望能少在菜地里花点时间。

malbatross_feather.en: This would be a nice feather in my cap.
malbatross_feather.trans: 这根羽毛放在我的帽子上会很搭。

yoth_lance.en: I suppose that's the stabbing end.
yoth_lance.trans: 我想……那头是用来捅人的。

kitcoon_rocky.en: What a pathetic little creature. It doesn't even have the grace of a catcoon.
kitcoon_rocky.trans: 多么可悲的小动物。完全看不到浣猫的那种优雅。

boatrace_start.en: Can I just wait here for everyone to be done?
boatrace_start.trans: 我能在这里等着大家忙完吗？

wobster_moonglass.en: They didn't look like that when I was in charge.
wobster_moonglass.trans: 我主政的时候，它们可不是这样。

twiggy_nut_sapling.en: It's of no use in it's current state. Only time will tell.
twiggy_nut_sapling.trans: 它现在这种状态没有用。只有时间会说明一切。

farm_soil_debris.en: The blasted things spring up again just as fast as I can remove them.
farm_soil_debris.trans: 这些该死的东西，我刚弄掉就又跳出来了。

bullkelp_root.en: For keeping the peasantry in line.

cookiecuttershell.en: Hmph. I suppose this could be useful.

spider_dropper.en: Creatures in this world evolve at a terrifying rate.
spider_dropper.trans: 这个世界的生物进化的速度越来越恐怖了。

moonspiderden.trans: 我可不想去瞅里面是什么。

alterguardian_phase3dead.en: I don't know what to believe. All this time, I thought that They were...
alterguardian_phase3dead.trans: 我也不知道该相信什么了。我总以为他们……

1.en: Quite the precocious poltergeist, aren't you?

2.en: Quite the precocious poltergeist, aren't you?

1.en: Quite the precocious poltergeist, aren't you?

2.en: Quite the precocious poltergeist, aren't you?

1.en: Quite the precocious poltergeist, aren't you?

2.en: Quite the precocious poltergeist, aren't you?

bananabush.en: Bananas that don't grow in caves? Preposterous.
bananabush.trans: 洞穴外生长的香蕉？荒唐。

shadowthrall_wings.en: You think you can look down on me?
shadowthrall_wings.trans: 你以为你能对我居高临下？

charging.en: Sleeping on the job, I see.

charged.en: Sleeping on the job, I see.

generic.en: Honestly, I don't trust it.

off.en: Sleeping on the job, I see.

generic.en: It jumps and licks things.

fireballstaff.en: A staff after my own heart!
fireballstaff.trans: 这根魔杖太合我心意了！

cookedmandrake.en: It has lost a lot of its power.

generic.en: The Walrusser can't be far.
generic.trans: 海象肯定在不远的地方。

empty.en: I best not linger when winter comes.
empty.trans: 冬天来的时候，我最好别在这里晃悠。

dug_bananabush.en: Bananas that don't grow in caves? Preposterous.
dug_bananabush.trans: 洞穴外生长的香蕉？荒唐。

treegrowthsolution.en: Looks like you're in a bit of a jam, pal.
treegrowthsolution.trans: 看来你遇到了一点麻烦，伙计。

eyeturret_item.en: Now it just needs to be set up.

fence_rotator.en: What insidious magic. It draws power from eye rolls and groans.
fence_rotator.trans: 多么阴险的魔法。它从翻白眼和呻吟中汲取力量。

wx78module_heat.en: That robot needs to pull themselves together.
wx78module_heat.trans: 那个机器人需要把自己的零件都装好。

slingshotammo_gunpowder.en: Ah, now that might be interesting.

grassgator.trans: 这是一种相当胆小的生物。

cave_entrance_ruins.trans: 或许不能再深入冒险了。

telestaff.en: Magic can do amazing things, when funneled through the right channels.
telestaff.trans: 只要渠道正确，魔法就能做到不可思议的事情。

red_cap.en: I forget what this one does.
red_cap.trans: 我忘记这东西有什么用了。

yotr_token.trans: 要来一场绅士间的决斗吗？

molehat.en: No wonder they can dig for hours.
molehat.trans: 难怪它们能挖几个小时的洞。

slurperpelt.en: In death, this creature will serve me!
slurperpelt.trans: 这家伙死后将为我所用！

marblepillar.en: I've always wondered who built those.
marblepillar.trans: 我总想知道谁建造了那些东西。

squid.en: I hope they stay close. But not too close.
squid.trans: 我希望它们靠的近一点。但别太近。

teleportato_potato.en: The gears in here are so small they turn the fabric of reality.
teleportato_potato.trans: 这里面的齿轮非常小，但它们足以扭转现实的纤维。

pond.en: I can see my face reflected off the top.
pond.trans: 我可以从池面倒影看到我的脸。

armorskeleton.en: Like all things, it craves the fuel.
armorskeleton.trans: 和一切事物一样，它渴望燃料。

generic.en: I miss a good long bath.

empty.en: It's of no use to me like this.
empty.trans: 这个样子对我是没用了。

chesspiece_wagboss_lunar.en: It was a culmination of terrible decisions.
chesspiece_wagboss_lunar.trans: 这是一系列糟糕决策带来的恶果。

merm_toolshed_upgraded.en: I'm certain there's nothing inside I'd want.
merm_toolshed_upgraded.trans: 我确定里面没有我想要的东西。

generic.en: Rustic, but excellent shade.
generic.trans: 很土气，但是遮荫效果很好。

burnt.en: So much for the shade thing.
burnt.trans: 这个凉棚也就到此为止了。

malbatross_feathered_weave.en: Hopefully it catches the wind as well as the eye.
malbatross_feathered_weave.trans: 很吸引眼球，希望也能“拉风”。

bearger_fur.en: This would make a nice rug.
bearger_fur.trans: 这可以做成一块不错的小地毯。

dumbbell_redgem.en: It has all the grace and subtlety I'd expect from the strongman.
dumbbell_redgem.trans: 它具有我所期望的壮士的所有优雅和微妙。

eel.en: It slithers all the way down.

trunk_cooked.en: At least the mucus burned off.
trunk_cooked.trans: 至少这些鼻涕被烧光了。

diviningrodstart.en: The portals lead to the next rod.
diviningrodstart.trans: 这些门通往下一根探测杖。

pondeel.en: It slithers all the way down.

spider_water.trans: 你真让人高兴，你知道吗！

boat_bumper_crabking.en: Looks heavy enough to sink us.
boat_bumper_crabking.trans: 这么重，怕是要把我们都弄沉。

doll_blueprint.en: I can only imagine how grotesque this will look...
doll_blueprint.trans: 只能想象看起来会有多丑……

spider_healer_item.en: Just in case I lose my mind entirely and want to heal those little pests.
spider_healer_item.trans: 留着它以防我完全失去理智，想要医治那些小害虫。

firestarter.en: Do I smell fire and brimstone?
firestarter.trans: 我闻到的是火焰和硫磺的味道吗？

ghost.en: Serves you right, meddling imp.
ghost.trans: 活该，你这个爱管闲事的恶魔！

murderer.en: Enough is enough! Prepare to be banished, imp!
murderer.trans: 够了！准备接受放逐吧，恶魔！

attacker.en: Do not make me bind you with magic, imp.
attacker.trans: 别让我用魔法来束缚你，恶魔。

reviver.en: Hm. I'll allow you to stay on this plane awhile longer.
reviver.trans: 嗯。我姑且让你在这个世界多晃荡一会。

generic.en: Greetings, Mr. %s.

dock_woodposts_item.en: Do I look like a common laborer to you?
dock_woodposts_item.trans: 在你眼里我就是一个普通劳工吗？

firestarter.en: Do not blow this for us, %s.
firestarter.trans: %s，不要将这个怪罪到我们身上。

ghost.en: I'll have to pay in blood to bring you back, %s.
ghost.trans: %s，我得以血相抵把你带回。

murderer.en: Old habits die hard... and so will you!
murderer.trans: 所谓本性难移啊…你也是！

attacker.en: I know that look, %s. What are you up to?
attacker.trans: %s，我知道那个表情。你在忙什么？

reviver.en: Trust only yourself, hey %s?

generic.en: What a dapper fellow!

purebrilliance.en: I wonder if she knows about this...

fishmeat_small_dried.en: My teeth are getting too old for this.
fishmeat_small_dried.trans: 我的牙根本咬不动这个。

compostwrap.en: I'm utterly dung with all of this.

nonslipgritboosted.en: All this salt on the ground is going to ruin my shoes.
nonslipgritboosted.trans: 地上这么多盐，我的鞋子要毁了。

carnivaldecor_lamp_kit.en: There's no end to the work around here, it seems.
carnivaldecor_lamp_kit.trans: 这里的工作没有尽头，似乎是这样。

inground.en: It'll have to come back for it.

generic.en: It's a red mushroom.

gravy.en: I have a tendency to overdo it on the gravy.
gravy.trans: 遇到肉汁，我每次都管不住口。

burning.en: It's best to be rid of it.

reviving.trans: 这倒霉东西变成傀儡了！

generic.en: Disgusting.

junk_pile.en: Have I really been reduced to sifting through the trash?
junk_pile.trans: 我当真沦落到要翻垃圾了？

retrieving_item.en: It seems I've gotten a hold of something.

generic.en: We are to start dredging up what lies beneath now, are we?
generic.trans: 要挖个天翻地覆了，是不是？

carrot.en: I'm not a fan of vegetables.

wagdrone_parts.en: A trophy for besting a machine.

generic.en: Those scales sure are nifty.

i_won.en: I'd almost forgotten the sweet taste of victory.
i_won.trans: 我都差点忘记胜利的甜美滋味了。

burnt.en: I've no use for it anymore.

generic.en: Such frivolity.

burnt.en: Somehow, it says even less now.
burnt.trans: 就这样，它现在透露的信息更少了。

generic.en: "You are here"... I wish I wasn't!

poop.en: It's the way of all mortal life.
poop.trans: 凡间生命都免不了吃喝拉撒。

wortox_souljar.en: He's a soul sucker, that one.
wortox_souljar.trans: 那家伙会吸走人的灵魂。

quagmire_carrot_seeds.en: Am I supposed to plant these?

book_fossil.en: I could stop a fiend in its tracks with this.
book_fossil.trans: 我能用这个阻挡恶魔的脚步。

beeswax_spray.en: I'm picking up notes of terror, with a hint of dread.
beeswax_spray.trans: 我嗅到恐怖的气息中还夹杂着淡淡的绝望。

ready.en: We'll get you out in a tick, friend.
ready.trans: 我们一会儿就会让你出来，朋友。

covered.en: Waste of good marble if you ask me.
covered.trans: 如果你问我，我会说是在浪费优质大理石。

finished.trans: 恢复到本来该有的样子了。

garlic_cooked.en: I wonder if it still wards away the undead.
garlic_cooked.trans: 不知道它还能不能驱走亡灵。

chestupgrade_stacksize.en: Hmph. Dress it up with wires and gears, but I know magic when I see it.
chestupgrade_stacksize.trans: 哼。管你怎么用电线和齿轮来装扮，我还是一眼就看出了魔法。

chesspiece_pawn.en: I have no idea what that is.
chesspiece_pawn.trans: 我完全不知道那是什么。

carnivalgame_feedchicks_food.en: These props leave something to be desired.

moonglass.en: But does it look as sharp as me?

yotb_stage.en: Hmph. What makes him think he's qualified to pass judgement?
yotb_stage.trans: 哼，他有什么资格评判别人？

complete.en: Was it wise to unleash this upon the world?
complete.trans: 在这世界释放这东西是明智的吗？

funny.en: It will be the laughingstock of the demon community.
funny.trans: 它会成为魔鬼一族中的笑柄。

generic.en: The beginnings of some demonic beast.

mask_ancient_masonhat.en: The mask of a laborer, no doubt.

quagmire_potato_seeds.en: Am I supposed to plant these?

carnivalgame_herding_kit.en: I suppose I'm expected to set this up myself?
carnivalgame_herding_kit.trans: 所以还指望我自己来搭这个？

warglet.en: They're smaller than I remember... going soft on us, Charlie?
warglet.trans: 它们比我记得的要小……心软了，查理？

hermit_cracked_pearl.en: Ah. I thought I'd run out of people to disappoint.
hermit_cracked_pearl.trans: 啊。我还以为我把能得罪的人都得罪完了。

record_end.en: Forgive me if I've lost my taste for music.
record_end.trans: 抱歉，是我丢了音乐的品味。

off.en: I suppose we're decorating with fungus now.
off.trans: 我想我们现在在用霉菌进行装饰。

koalefant_summer.en: A distant cousin of the beefalo.

goldenpitchfork.en: I'm not sure this was a good investment.
goldenpitchfork.trans: 我不确定这笔投资是否划算。

asparagus_seeds.trans: 这种低贱的活不适合我。

critter_perdling.en: You're as fowl as I am!

kitcoonden_kit.en: I don't see why I need to build them a house. They need to learn to climb trees like adults.
kitcoonden_kit.trans: 我不明白为什么我需要给它们建一个房子。它们理应像成年猫一样学会爬树。

oceanfishinglure_spinner_blue.en: At least I don't have to use worms.

powcake.en: What foul manifestation of evil is this?
powcake.trans: 这是什么邪恶的鬼东西？

recharging.en: It looks like she'll have to wait, for once.

generic.en: Careful, madam. I know where this trail ultimately leads.
generic.trans: 小心点，夫人。我知道这条路通向哪里。

generic.en: I'm not above using this.
generic.trans: 我可不会为使用这个而感到羞愧。

burnt.en: No one will be using that any longer.
burnt.trans: 没人会再使用那个东西了。

alterguardianhatshard.trans: 它即使被打碎了还是有力量。

oceanfishinglure_hermit_rain.en: Go fishing in the rain? And ruin my last good suit?
oceanfishinglure_hermit_rain.trans: 让我淋着雨去钓鱼？把我最后一件好的西服也毁掉？

generic.en: What a sad little hovel.
Could use a few more mechanical bits in my opinion.
generic.trans: 依我之见，应该再多用些机械部件。

mask_toadyhat.en: I'd prefer not to put that on my face.
mask_toadyhat.trans: 那玩意我就不往脸上挂了。

generic.en: This feels ridiculous.

activated.trans: 也不知道为什么，它居然能起作用。

shadowheart.en: A pulse of malice and betrayal beats within.
shadowheart.trans: 里面跳动着恶意和背叛的脉搏。

sweettea.en: I can't even remember the last time I had a decent cup of tea.
sweettea.trans: 我都不记得上次喝到像样的茶是什么时候了。

generic.en: It's worse knowing what the other part looks like.
generic.trans: 知道其他部分长什么样子后感觉更糟糕。

open.en: I assure you that it smells worse than it looks.
open.trans: 我保证，它闻起来比看上去更糟糕。

battlesong_instant_panic.en: My acts were always a bit more improvisational.
battlesong_instant_panic.trans: 我的表演通常是即兴的。

pondfish.trans: 从混浊的深水中新鲜捕捞的。

moon_altar_icon.en: I know where you need to be.

generic.en: I'm sure it will burn out eventually.
generic.trans: 我确定它终于熄灭的时候。

quagmire_key_park.trans: 这个应该能打开一些门。

tourtiere.en: I haven't had a meat pie since I left Liverpool.
tourtiere.trans: 自从离开了利物浦，我就再没吃过肉饼了。

held.en: I could squish them if I wanted to.
held.trans: 要是我想的话，我可以捏扁它们。

generic.en: How pretty.

dragonfruit_cooked.en: A little more refined, at least.

blackflag.en: Black never goes out of style.

roastturkey.en: I myself will carve this roast beast.
roastturkey.trans: 我来亲自操刀切这块烤肉。

vault_orb.trans: 这是某个东西的一部分。

gelblob_storage_kit.trans: 不要了。我不喜欢黏糊糊的东西。

minotaurhorn.en: A regrettable end, my old friend.
minotaurhorn.trans: 真是个遗憾的结局啊，我的老朋友。

held.en: I hope it doesn't stain my jacket.
held.trans: 希望它不会弄脏我的夹克。

generic.en: How can a seed be so cheerful?

chopped.en: That's not about to grow back.

generic.en: An acquaintance of mine describes them as "piney".
generic.trans: 我的一个熟人说它们“满是松针”。

battlesong_container.en: As good a place as any to stash sheet music away.
battlesong_container.trans: 这是个藏乐谱的好地方。

tallbirdegg_cooked.trans: 它的味道就像破碎的梦想。

animal_track.en: Some dumb beast passed through here.
animal_track.trans: 某只蠢笨的动物经过了这里。

costume_blacksmith_body.en: It seems the costumes are provided.

wagboss_robot_leg.en: It's surprisingly intact. Still broke off though.
wagboss_robot_leg.trans: 尽管掉了下来，却意外地完好无损。

ancient_altar_broken.trans: 这个可以在一定程度上修复。

wx78module_maxhunger.en: That robot needs to pull themselves together.
wx78module_maxhunger.trans: 那个机器人需要把自己的零件都装好。

lavaarena_crowndamagerhat.en: You'd need a thick neck to wear such a thing.
lavaarena_crowndamagerhat.trans: 你的脖子必须够粗才能戴上这玩意。

generic.en: It requires payment.

oceanfish_small_5.en: Its smell oddly reminds me of the theater house...
oceanfish_small_5.trans: 它的味道竟然让我想起了戏院……

oceanfish_small_7.en: It seems more plant than fish.

oceanfish_small_1.en: This was barely worth my time.

burnt.en: The scarecrow has gone to a place where there is no fear.
burnt.trans: 稻草人已经去了一个没有恐惧的地方。

generic.en: It's an empty shell of a man.

wall_moonrock.en: I like to build walls between myself and the world.
wall_moonrock.trans: 我喜欢在我和世界之间筑起一道墙。

oceanfish_small_3.en: I was hoping for something bigger.

ghost.en: Oh, what a shame.
ghost.trans: 真可惜啊。

firestarter.en: %s's started some suspicious fires recently.
firestarter.trans: 最近好几场大火%s都有纵火嫌疑。

murderer.en: Eat this!
murderer.trans: 吃我一拳！

reviver.en: Thank-you for the assistance, %s.

generic.en: Greetings, Mr. %s.

cookedmeat.en: It smells less like barnyard, now.
cookedmeat.trans: 它现在没有那么难闻了。

held.en: I'm gonna turn you into puffin' stuff.
held.trans: 你要把你塞到感恩节的火鸡里烤了。

generic.en: It's a puffin.

sleeping.en: Sleep is only a temporary escape.

generic.en: Still inactive. Curious.

ghost.en: Time finally caught up to you, did it?
ghost.trans: 时间终于赶上了你，对不对？

firestarter.en: Far be it for me to question your methods, %s.
firestarter.trans: 我不会质疑你的方法的，%s。

murderer.en: Murderous fiend! I'll show you true power!
murderer.trans: 杀戮的魔鬼！我要让你看看真正的力量！

reviver.en: Your assistance was quite timely, %s.

generic.en: Good day, Ms. %s.

carpentry_blade_moonglass.trans: 作为一个劳动工具来说...很花哨。

boat_bumper_kelp.en: I don't know if the smell is worth the protection it offers.
boat_bumper_kelp.trans: 这么大的味儿，就算能提供防护也不值啊。

ghostlyelixir_shadow.en: It appears someone has been toying with the dark arts and crafts.
ghostlyelixir_shadow.trans: 看来有人在鼓捣黑暗魔法。

wagpunk_bits.en: Someone should collect this bric-à-brac and put it to use.
wagpunk_bits.trans: 找个人来收一下这些碎东西，没准能派上用场。

malbatross_beak.en: Ugh, I don't want to touch that.

deerclops.en: Even I'm afraid of that guy.

hermithotspring_constr.en: Yes, yes, under construction. What else is new?
hermithotspring_constr.trans: 是，是，施工中。能说点新鲜的不？

merm_armory_upgraded.en: Apparently, I'm not invited. Oh how shall I ever go on.
merm_armory_upgraded.trans: 我居然没有得到邀请。这让我怎么继续下去。

houndwhistle.en: Howl I ever find a use for this?
houndwhistle.trans: 我该怎么利用这个东西？

batnose_cooked.en: The things I must do to survive...

beefalotreat.en: Best to keep the beast placated for now.
beefalotreat.trans: 最好暂时安抚一下那头动物。

generic.en: I wish we'd get rid of that.

uncommon.en: Measly things. In my time I made proper statues...
uncommon.trans: 微不足道的东西。想当年我做的那才叫雕像……

rare.en: What exactly is so fantastic about it?
rare.trans: 它究竟有什么神奇之处？

generic.en: One more thing to clutter the ground.
generic.trans: 地上又要多一件垃圾了。

gift.trans: 一份优美地包装起来的社会责任。

collapsedchest.en: Do you really expect me to dig through that?
collapsedchest.trans: 你不会真的指望我去挖吧？

carnival_prizebooth_kit.en: Must I do everything around here?
carnival_prizebooth_kit.trans: 这里所有的事我都必须亲力亲为么？

alterguardianhat.en: It makes me uneasy... but I can't deny its power.
alterguardianhat.trans: 虽然它让我感到不舒服……不过我不能否认它的力量。

compost.en: I'd rather not get my hands dirty.

generic.en: How quaint.

empty.en: It needs some kind of meat.
empty.trans: 它需要一种肉。

quagmire_mealingstone.en: This looks like it requires hard labor.

cannonball_rock_item.en: That looks heavy. Someone should load it into the cannon.
cannonball_rock_item.trans: 这看起来很重。应该有人把它装进大炮。

balloonparty.en: Oh no... he's managed to make them even more cheerful.
balloonparty.trans: 噢不……他让它们看起来更欢乐了。

winter_ornament.en: Gaudy, like the rest of this shindig.
winter_ornament.trans: 艳俗，就像这个舞会剩下的所有东西。

butterflymuffin.en: That should stop its incessant flapping.
butterflymuffin.trans: 它应该不会再无休止地扇动翅膀了。

balatro_machine.en: The game is rigged! But I'll play again to be sure.
balatro_machine.trans: 这游戏有诈！但我要再玩一次确认下。

saddle_war.en: At least it affords some dignity to the rider.
saddle_war.trans: 至少它给骑手带来一些尊严。

wagpunk_workstation.en: What infernal devices are conjured here?
wagpunk_workstation.trans: 这里要造什么地狱装置？

yotb.en: This might be of interest to the judge.
yotb.trans: 评委也许对这个感兴趣。

generic.en: I've no need for such things.

tree_rock_sapling.trans: 等它长大要等到什么时候。

record_dawn.en: Forgive me if I've lost my taste for music.
record_dawn.trans: 抱歉，是我丢了音乐的品味。

generic.en: It provides a lovely ambiance of dread, don't you think?
generic.trans: 它提供了一种可爱的恐惧氛围，不是吗？

ghost.en: %s is looking a bit too much like her sister.
ghost.trans: %s看起来有点像她的孪生姐妹。

firestarter.en: Don't play with fire, Ms. %s.
firestarter.trans: %s小姐，请不要玩火。

murderer.en: Don't think I'll hesitate, murderous fiend!
murderer.trans: 杀人不眨眼的恶魔，不要妄想我会犹豫！

reviver.en: %s is a true death defier.

generic.en: Greetings, Miss %s. How are you?
generic.trans: 你好，%s 小姐。最近怎么样？

oceanwhirlbigportalexit.en: I'd rather not pick through that.

shell_cluster.en: That was not worth the effort.

asparagus_oversized.en: What am I supposed to do with all this asparagus?
asparagus_oversized.trans: 这么多芦笋我拿来做什么？

mandrake_planted.trans: 曼德拉草真是太烦人了。

rat.en: It's rather amusing to watch it scurry.
rat.trans: 看它小步快跑颇有趣味。

generic.en: Athletics were never my strong suit.
generic.trans: 竞速一直就不是我的强项。

cookbook.en: Very well. If I can master the dark arts, how hard could cooking be?
cookbook.trans: 没事。我连黑魔法都能掌握，做饭能有多难？

potato.en: It is in the nightshade family, you know.

lots.en: The mushrooms have really taken to the log.

some.en: They seem to be doing well.

snowcovered.en: Nothing grows in these frigid wastes.
snowcovered.trans: 这些寒冷的废弃物中什么也没长出来。

stuffed.en: It's so full it's almost obscene.
stuffed.trans: 它太满了，满得几乎可憎了。

rotten.en: Rotten, all the way through. I relate.

burnt.en: Only ash and ruin remain here.
burnt.trans: 这里只留下了灰烬和废墟。

empty.en: Smells... "piney".
empty.trans: 闻起来...“像松树”。

slingshotammo_freeze.en: Ah, now that might be interesting.

slingshotammo_poop.en: Must he leave that lying around? I nearly ruined my shoes.
slingshotammo_poop.trans: 他一定要把那东西留在身边吗？我差点就毁了我的鞋子。

burning.trans: 算是解决了一个问题吧。

generic.en: Ugh. I can't just leave that lying around.
generic.trans: 额。我不能把它扔在那不管。

mandrake_cooked.en: Looks like I got the last meep.

shark.en: What a nasty creature. I wish I'd thought of it.
shark.trans: 真是个难缠的生物。我当初怎么就没有想到。

quagmire_sap.en: I would rather not get that on my gloves.
quagmire_sap.trans: 我可不想要它沾在我的手套上。

wagstaff_npc.en: What is he up to now?

minerhat.trans: 这些萤火虫最终会饿死的。

anchor.en: I can drop it to keep the boat in place.
anchor.trans: 我可以放下去把船稳住。

book_elemental.en: The words within evoke an unknown force.
book_elemental.trans: 里面的文字能够召唤未知力量。

generic.en: Walking gets tiresome, you know.
generic.trans: 步行让人感到厌倦，你知道的。

chesspiece_guardianphase3.en: How could I not have seen...

healingstaff.en: I could be persuaded to dabble in white magicks.

growing.en: Now what are those bees up to?
growing.trans: 现在那些蜜蜂想干什么？

generic.en: I am not getting that on my shoes.
generic.trans: 我不会把那东西放在我的鞋子上。

carnivalgame_shooting_kit.en: I suppose I'm expected to set this up myself?
carnivalgame_shooting_kit.trans: 所以还指望我自己来搭这个？

moonstorm_goggleshat.en: There are hardly enough inventors brave enough to harness the power of potatoes.
moonstorm_goggleshat.trans: 没有足够的发明家敢于发掘土豆的力量。

ruins_bat.en: The fuel runs deep in this.

bird_egg.en: I like to think of it as baby bird prison.
bird_egg.trans: 我喜欢把它想象成幼鸟的牢笼。

generic.en: How monstrous.

held.en: You thought you could fool me?

generic.en: That carrot is revolting!

lore1.en: I have complicated feelings about this.

yellowgem.en: I can sense magic in it.
yellowgem.trans: 我能感觉到它体内的魔法。

charlie_lecturn.en: Misdirection, the oldest trick in the book. Well played, Charlie.
charlie_lecturn.trans: 误导，书中最古老的伎俩。干得漂亮，查理。

atrium_overgrowth.en: I can't believe I've forgotten how to read this.
atrium_overgrowth.trans: 不敢相信，我居然忘了怎么读这个。

quagmire_salt_rack_item.en: Just useless sticks until we assemble it.
quagmire_salt_rack_item.trans: 如果不装好，就只是没用的棍子。

miniflare.en: For those with a flare for the dramatic.

rabbitking_lucky.en: You've embarassed me for the last time, Simon!
rabbitking_lucky.trans: 这是你最后一次让我难堪了，西蒙！

berries_cooked.en: A little more refined, at least.

basalt.en: I made a rock so heavy that even I can't lift it.
basalt.trans: 我造了块石头，重得我都抬不起来。

spiderqueen.en: Maybe I'll just get out of her way.

withered.en: It wasn't hardy enough for the heat.

generic.en: That is a generic plant.

tacklestation.en: I suppose I could use a relaxing day of fishing.
tacklestation.trans: 就让我钓一天鱼放松一下吧。

quagmire_pot_hanger_item.en: Well I'M not setting it up.

hammer_mjolnir.en: I would never resort to something so brutish.
hammer_mjolnir.trans: 这么粗暴的事情我可做不出。

inert.en: I suppose we can't just leave well enough alone, can we?
inert.trans: 所有的和平不过是短暂的假象。

generic.en: Say, pal, why don't we try to work this out?
generic.trans: 伙计，我们有事好商量不好么？

hungry.en: They sure do eat a lot.

starving.en: A hungry beast is a dangerous beast.

generic.en: It's less cute now that it's grown up.

sleeping.en: It's much easier to deal with like this.

greenmooneye.en: It's useful for keeping in contact with my... acquaintances.
greenmooneye.trans: 和我的熟人们保持联系是...有用的。

held.en: I hope it doesn't stain my jacket.
held.trans: 希望它不会弄脏我的夹克。

generic.en: Hateful, ambulatory whimsy.
generic.trans: 可憎的，神出鬼没的怪念头。

halloweencandy_9.en: How the tables have turned, worm.
halloweencandy_9.trans: 情况变得怎么样啊，虫子。

hiding.en: This must be the work of an unseen hand.
hiding.trans: 这肯定是一只看不见的手的作品。

awake.trans: 哼...令人印象深刻的戏法。

robot_blueprint.trans: 这是那个机器人干的吗？

halloweencandy_7.en: I am much more disappointed than I thought I'd be.
halloweencandy_7.trans: 我比我想象的还失望得多。

halloweencandy_8.en: No one is above enjoying a good lollipop.

koalefant_winter.en: It has its winter coat on.

slurtleslime.en: There must be a better way.

gingerbreadwarg.en: Pretty brash for something so edible.
gingerbreadwarg.trans: 明明就是吃的，还这么招摇。

halloweencandy_1.en: Oh good, it's solid candy. I feared something healthy had snuck in.
halloweencandy_1.trans: 哦太好了，是硬糖。我恐怕一些健康的东西溜进来了。

recharging.en: It looks like she'll have to wait, for once.

generic.en: Careful, madam. I know where this trail ultimately leads.
generic.trans: 小心点，夫人。我知道这条路通向哪里。

generic.en: I don't trust that infernal jelly.
generic.trans: 我不相信那个该死的果冻。

halloweencandy_5.trans: 几乎是惹人喜爱的。只能说是几乎。

halloweencandy_6.en: A mystery I'm not keen on solving.
halloweencandy_6.trans: 我不热衷于解决的一个秘密。

halloweencandy_3.en: Who is making all this candy, exactly?
halloweencandy_3.trans: 到底是谁在制作这样的糖果？

halloweencandy_4.trans: 黑色甘草糖，是我最喜欢的。

hungry.en: It's hungry. Why is it hungry?

starving.en: I think it's going to die!

generic.en: You're not a hellbeast, are you? Nooo. Just misunderstood!
generic.trans: 你不是地狱兽，你是？不会吧，误会了！

content.en: It's happy with me, and I with it.
content.trans: 它和我呆一起很开心，我也是。

salty_doghat.en: It conveys an air of authority. I think it suits me.
salty_doghat.trans: 它透着一股权威感。我觉得很适合我。

bushhat.en: There's room in there for me.

cookiecutterhat.en: This doesn't look dapper at all.

halloweenpotion_bravery.en: Takes away the horrors. But who would want that?
halloweenpotion_bravery.trans: 能驱散恐惧。但谁会想那么做呢？

bananapop.en: Hm... I don't know what I was expecting.
bananapop.trans: 嗯...我不知道我期待的是什么。

bootleg.en: Best not to think about where it's been.
bootleg.trans: 最好不要去想它到过哪里。

lightcrab.en: Oh good. The island is crawling with vermin.

deer_gemmed.en: The gem imbues its attacks with a fearsome power.
deer_gemmed.trans: 宝石让它的攻击有了一种可怕的力量。

moon_fissure_plugged.en: It's almost genius in its simplicity... but it does smell.
moon_fissure_plugged.trans: 这种简洁的处理方式简直令人赞叹……只是有点臭。

wurt_swampitem_shadow.en: How heartwarming to see today's youth take an interest in shadow magic.
wurt_swampitem_shadow.trans: 看到当代年轻人对暗影魔法的浓厚兴趣，我感到非常暖心。

upgraded_stacksize.en: A place to store lots of loot.
upgraded_stacksize.trans: 一个装大量战利品的地方。

burnt.trans: 它现在不能装任何东西了。

generic.en: A place to store loot.

grass_umbrella.trans: 与其说它“整洁”，不如说它“漂亮”。

boat_ancient_container.en: Now those apes won't get their grubby hands on my loot.
boat_ancient_container.trans: 现在，那些猩猩再也不能用它们的脏手碰我的战利品了。

sleep.en: Well sure, if you want to take the easy way out.
sleep.trans: 好吧，你抄了个捷径，选了个简单的办法。

burning.en: I'm going to pretend I don't see it.

generic.en: Well sure, if you want to take the easy way out.
generic.trans: 好吧，你抄了个捷径，选了个简单的办法。

off.en: It's useless out here without power.

gestalt.en: It communes with us through them.
gestalt.trans: 它通过这些东西与我们交谈。

lunarplant_husk.en: The blasted thing is finally dead.
lunarplant_husk.trans: 那该死的东西总算死透了。

critter_lunarmothling.en: You had better not chew holes in my suit.
critter_lunarmothling.trans: 最好别把我的西装咬出洞来。

quagmire_pot_small.en: I shalln't let it speak with the kettle.
quagmire_pot_small.trans: 我不会让它和水壶互嘲的。

yotb_stage_item.en: Oh good, something more to build.
yotb_stage_item.trans: 哎呦喂，又要多建一件东西。

halloween_ornament_1.en: Oh joy. Is there really need for decoration?

halloween_ornament_2.en: Such a burden to carry it. If only there were a place to leave it.
halloween_ornament_2.trans: 带着它真累赘。如果能把它留在什么地方就好了。

halloween_ornament_3.en: I like the real ones better.

halloween_ornament_4.en: Shouldn't it be hanging from somewhere.
halloween_ornament_4.trans: 这个不是应该挂起来吗？

rat.en: The training seems to be progressing well.

generic.en: An underling must be able to follow directions.

lunarthrall_plant.en: I don't think it's from around here.

costume_princess_body.en: I suppose it goes with the bossy horse head.
costume_princess_body.trans: 跟那颗爱摆架子的马头倒挺配。

generic.en: It seems my fortune's changing.
generic.trans: 看起来我的运气正在改变。

burnt.en: It's no use to anyone now.
burnt.trans: 它现在对任何人都没有用处了。

empty.en: Something else seems to be required.
empty.trans: 似乎还需要其他一些东西。

nightmaregrowth.trans: 查理……你又在打什么算盘？

cutreeds.en: I think I could build something useful from this.
cutreeds.trans: 我想我可以用这个来造点有用的东西。

pinecone_sapling.en: Huh, it seems to belong in the ground.

yotc_carrat_gym_speed_item.trans: 我应该尽快把这个建好。

rat.en: Hm. I'm getting a sudden craving for popcorn...

generic.en: You never know what might pop up on the race track.
generic.trans: 赛场上什么都有可能发生。

turtillus.trans: 他是个脑袋笨重的家伙。

book_moon.en: We've come this far, no point in stopping our meddling now.
book_moon.trans: 既然我们都走到了这一步了，不如就继续干预下去吧。

shadowdigger.en: I'm a shadow of myself. Ha-ha!

dug.en: That one's already been done in.
dug.trans: 那个东西已经筋疲力尽。

generic.en: What lies beneath?

lunarplanthat.trans: 外观有一种美妙的不祥之兆。

stuffedeggplant.en: A meal fit for a king... or at least someone with a throne.
stuffedeggplant.trans: 适合国王...或至少是有王座的人的膳食。

turfcraftingstation.en: I despise getting my hands dirty.

generic.en: My beautiful machine is in pieces!
generic.trans: 我美丽的机器已经被拆成了很多块！

chesspiece_toadstool.en: At least the statue doesn't smell as bad as the original.
chesspiece_toadstool.trans: 至少雕像的味道没有真身那么臭。

spice_sugar.en: I never was one for syrupy mush.
spice_sugar.trans: 我从来就不爱吃黏糊糊的糖浆。

houndbone.trans: 它们是饥饿的魔鬼，不是吗？

quagmire_salmon_cooked.en: I do enjoy a good smoked salmon.

tallbirdegg.en: Tallbirds are territorial because of these things.
tallbirdegg.trans: 因为这些东西的存在，高脚鸟很有领地意识。

sleeping.trans: 睡觉的时候都在流口水。

generic.en: A flying goop factory.

greenamulet.en: A crutch for pitiful mortals without godlike powers. What?
greenamulet.trans: 没有超绝能力的可怜之人使用的拐杖。什么？

thurible.trans: 很奇特。闻起来像是玫瑰。

otter.en: Keep a distance, you crooked creature!
otter.trans: 离我远点，你这个流氓生物！

armorwood.en: Ugh. I'm not typically one for vulgar fisticuffs.
armorwood.trans: 呃，这种粗俗的斗殴和我一点都不衬。

shadow_forge.en: What shall I fashion from the shadows?
shadow_forge.trans: 我拿暗影塑造点什么好呢？

chesspiece_kitcoon.en: This is a rather precarious design.
chesspiece_kitcoon.trans: 这是一个相当不稳定的设计。

record_balatro.en: The jovial sound invades my mind. Keep it off.
record_balatro.trans: 欢快的声音侵入我的大脑了。快关掉它。

quagmire_crabmeat_cooked.en: Perfect with a bit of butter.

watermelon.en: It's mostly water. Fibrous, sweet water.
watermelon.trans: 它里面主要是水。纤维状的、甜蜜的水。

veggie_oversized_rotten.en: It's no good to anyone now.
veggie_oversized_rotten.trans: 它现在对任何人都没有用了。

ancient_husk.en: Like I said, they were a nasty lot.
ancient_husk.trans: 如我所言，他们是一群卑劣之徒。

crabking_cannontower.en: Watch it where you shoot those things!

stalker.en: There is no limit to the power of shadows.

portabletent_item.en: Surely someone else can set it up.

dug_berrybush.en: Do I look like a gardener?

scraphat.en: Can you really call that pile of refuse a hat?
scraphat.trans: 就那堆垃圾也能算帽子？

burnt.en: Somehow, it says even less now.
burnt.trans: 就这样，它现在透露的信息更少了。

generic.en: "Thataway"... Ugh!

firestarter.en: The fire is supposed to go in the pit, Higgsbury.
firestarter.trans: 希格斯伯里，火要烧到洞里了。

ghost.en: Are you certain you wish to return to this world?
ghost.trans: 你确定你想要回到这个世界吗？

murderer.en: Our truce ends here, murderer!
murderer.trans: 我们的停战到此结束，你这个杀人凶手！

attacker.en: You're going off the deep end, pal.

reviver.en: %s is a real pal...

generic.en: Err, greetings, Mr. %s.

quagmire_goatmilk.en: My bones are naturally fragile, I'm afraid.
quagmire_goatmilk.trans: 恐怕我的骨头天生就是脆弱的。

quagmire_wheat_seeds.en: Am I supposed to plant these?

remains_eye_bone.en: Don't worry. There will be more Chesters.
remains_eye_bone.trans: 别担心。会有更多切斯特的。

remains_glommerflower.trans: 总是会有另一只格罗姆。

remains_thingie.en: My trip through the portal made it unrecognizable.
remains_thingie.trans: 传送门之旅使它变得无法辨别了。

generic.en: A fine powder that smells of destruction.
generic.trans: 细细的粉末，闻起来有毁灭的味道。

generic.en: Now to see if Higgsbury's ideas hold water.
generic.trans: 来看看希格斯伯里的想法对不对。

leafymeatsouffle.en: I appreciate the attempt at presentation.
leafymeatsouffle.trans: 我欣赏对于造型的尝试。

firepen.en: Words hold power. Pens too, apparently.
firepen.trans: 看来有力量的不仅是言语，还有笔。

stuffing.en: Something to fill the void in my stomach.

burning.en: I'm going to pretend I don't see it.

off.en: It's useless out here without power.

generic.en: Not bad, for a parlour trick.
generic.trans: 卖艺卖成这样已经不错了。

quagmire_rubble_pubdoor.trans: 要是它能通往某个地方就好了。

durian_seeds.trans: 这种低贱的活不适合我。

cave_banana_burnt.en: I refuse to be held responsible for that.

pomegranate_cooked.en: A little more refined, at least.

pomegranate_seeds.trans: 这种低贱的活不适合我。

seastack.en: It would be easy to wreck a vessel on one of those.

mandrake.trans: 我的耳朵还在嗡嗡作响。

type3.en: Needs something. Perhaps some long-stemmed roses...
type3.trans: 缺少了一些东西。或许是长茎玫瑰...

type2.en: She's still in there somewhere. I know it.
type2.trans: 她还在那里的某个地方。我知道。

type1.en: Her tragedy does not define her.

generic.en: Hm. Stately.

carnival_host.en: Just look at him, strutting around like he owns the place.
carnival_host.trans: 你们都看看他大摇大摆那样子，他还真把自己当这里的主人了。

eyeofterror_mini.en: We're going to be up to our eyeballs in... eyeballs.
eyeofterror_mini.trans: 我们会拥有堆到眼球那么高的……眼球。

underground.en: Are you picking up what I'm putting down? Do you dig it?
underground.trans: 你捡起了我放下的东西吗？你挖出了它吗？

critter_glomling.en: You are much too trusting, friend.

ghostlyelixir_revive.en: It appears someone has been toying with the dark arts and crafts.
ghostlyelixir_revive.trans: 看来有人在鼓捣黑暗魔法。

saltbox.en: This will extend the life of our supplies somewhat.
saltbox.trans: 这个会延长我们补给品的使用时间。

has_item.en: Someone should really set this table.
has_item.trans: 找个人来摆好这张桌子吧。

generic.en: Someone should really set this table.
generic.trans: 找个人来摆好这张桌子吧。

burnt.en: It didn't go with the decor anyway.
burnt.trans: 反正跟装饰也不是很搭。

tentacle.en: I'm glad the rest of it is still down there.
tentacle.trans: 我很高兴，它的其余部分还在下面。

walkingplank.en: Jumping off would ruin what's left of my suit.
walkingplank.trans: 跳下去的话，我剩下的西装也会被泡坏。

fishtacos.en: Cooked fish in a crunchy shell.

merm_tool_upgraded.en: Why specialize when you can be mediocre at everything, hm?
merm_tool_upgraded.trans: 事事都做平庸算了，专攻有用吗？

generic.en: I don't know how they got here.
generic.trans: 我不知道它们怎么到这里来的。

oceanfishingbobber_canary.en: I used to see quill floats like this back in England.
oceanfishingbobber_canary.trans: 我在英国的时候见过这种浮在海里的羽毛。

cane.en: It has pictures of fast things carved into it.
cane.trans: 它身上雕刻着神行物的图案。

diseasing.en: Looks a little off, if you ask me.
diseasing.trans: 如果你问我，我会说看起来有点儿失水准。

burning.en: It better not start talking to me.
burning.trans: 它最好不要开始和我聊天。

picked.en: I fear I'll have to wait.

diseased.en: What has brought this blight upon my world?
diseased.trans: 是谁把疫病带到我这儿来的？

generic.en: The berries will stay fresh as long as I leave them there.
generic.trans: 把浆果留在那里能保持新鲜。

barren.en: It looks to be in need of assistance. Fertilizer, perhaps?
barren.trans: 它看起来亟需支援。或许需要化肥？

sleepbomb.en: It appears to be a sleeping bag.

generic.en: Didn't think I'd ever come back here.
generic.trans: 从未想过我还会回到这里。

empty.en: It's not in season.
empty.trans: 枯水期。

pepper_seeds.en: Am I supposed to plant these?

yotb.en: This might be of interest to the judge.
yotb.trans: 评委也许对这个感兴趣。

generic.en: I've no need for such things.

voidclothhat.en: Darkness is an often underrated accessory.
voidclothhat.trans: 黑暗这种配饰常常被低估。

bird_mutant.en: That creature has seen better days.
bird_mutant.trans: 那个生物曾经也美好过。

opalstaff.en: The charge has made it incredibly powerful.
opalstaff.trans: 充电让它变得难以置信地强大。

ghostflowerhat.en: Talk about a near death experience.
ghostflowerhat.trans: 来一次接近死亡的体验。

orangegem.en: This will be quite powerful with some fuel.
orangegem.trans: 只要有一些燃料，它会相当强大。

orangemooneye.en: I have a feeling of being watched, even from a considerable distance away.
orangemooneye.trans: 我感觉被监视了，即使是从很远的距离外。

lobsterdinner.en: Finally, something to suit my refined palate.
lobsterdinner.trans: 终于吃到点符合我身份的东西了。

struggle.en: And I thought chivalry was dead!
struggle.trans: 我还以为骑士精神已经没落了呢！

generic.en: A dreadful lack of accordions.

shadowthrall_hands.en: You think you're the master of sleight of hand?
shadowthrall_hands.trans: 你觉得自己是魔术大师吗？

lunarrift_portal.en: I don't like the look of this.

slingshotmodkit.en: He'll shoot his eye out if he's not careful.
slingshotmodkit.trans: 他一不小心就会把自己的眼睛打瞎。

generic.en: A fire pit.

koalefig_trunk.en: I hope it was well cleaned before we stuffed the figs inside.
koalefig_trunk.trans: 我希望是先洗干净了才包无花果进去。

high.en: That will keep Charlie away for now.
high.trans: 这会让查理暂时远离我。

generic.en: How comforting.
Moderately tough, but flammable.
generic.trans: 有点坚硬，但还是可以燃烧的。

wet.en: It's nothing but foul wet slop.

generic.en: Disgusting.

burnt.en: It smells about as bad as you'd imagine.
burnt.trans: 它的气味和你想象的一样糟糕。

cattoy_mouse.en: The classic game of catcoon and mechanical mouse.
cattoy_mouse.trans: 经典的浣猫和机械鼠的游戏。

axe.en: Sometimes the direct approach is best.
axe.trans: 有时候，直截了当的方法是最好的。

winter_ornamentpearl.en: That old crab does have some skill.
winter_ornamentpearl.trans: 那老螃蟹确实有点手艺。

boat_bumper_crabking_kit.en: Ugh. These menial tasks do not suit me.
boat_bumper_crabking_kit.trans: 呃。这些琐碎的工作并不适合我。

lit.trans: 多么令人愉快的不祥之兆。

generic.en: Let's add a little fire for dramatic effect.
generic.trans: 让我们加一点火来增加戏剧效果。

lit.en: A homely statue. Perhaps it can be improved.
lit.trans: 一个朴素的雕像。或许还可以改进。

generic.en: Let's add a little fire for dramatic effect.
generic.trans: 让我们加一点火来增加戏剧效果。

quagmire_goatmum.en: May I peruse your wares, ma'am?
quagmire_goatmum.trans: 能否让我仔细看看您的货物呢，女士？

lit.trans: 它有一些令人着迷的东西。

generic.en: Let's add a little fire for dramatic effect.
generic.trans: 让我们加一点火来增加戏剧效果。

lavaarena_armormediumdamager.en: This was intended for someone physically-inclined.
lavaarena_armormediumdamager.trans: 这个可以用来对付有暴力倾向的家伙。

dumbbell.en: I have no interest in such things.

chester.en: Annoying little monster. Has his uses, though.
chester.trans: 烦人的小怪物，尽管有它的用途。

charging.en: Good. Let her ferry our supplies around.
charging.trans: 很好。就让她搬运我们的物资吧。

charged.en: Good. Let her ferry our supplies around.
charged.trans: 很好。就让她搬运我们的物资吧。

generic.en: Good. Let her ferry our supplies around.
generic.trans: 很好。就让她搬运我们的物资吧。

off.en: It's useless out here without power.

grotto_pool_small.en: I suppose it is quite picturesque.

generic.en: Well?

burnt.en: I was never that into horses.
burnt.trans: 我对马一直没什么兴趣。

empty.en: Nothing is free in this world.
empty.trans: 这世上没有免费的东西。

wall_stone_2.en: This will keep the riff-raff out.
wall_stone_2.trans: 那些乌合之众再也进不来了。

frozen.en: It's almost too cold to hold.

hot.en: It's almost too hot to hold.

generic.en: A pocketful of stone and temperature.
generic.trans: 装在口袋里的石头，可以提供热量。

mapscroll.en: There's nothing to be gleaned from this.
mapscroll.trans: 这里面没有什么需要收集的。

redlantern.en: Not having a light would certainly be unlucky.
redlantern.trans: 一点光也没有，当然是不幸运的。

lureplantbulb.en: Perhaps I can use this to my advantage.
lureplantbulb.trans: 或许我能让它好好发挥作用。

barnaclepita.en: I suppose I'll eat it if there's nothing else.
barnaclepita.trans: 我想，如果没有别的东西，那我就吃吧。

wx78module_maxsanity.en: That robot needs to pull themselves together.
wx78module_maxsanity.trans: 那个机器人需要把自己的零件都装好。

has_food.en: I suppose I'll have to share.

generic.en: Must we go through this production for a little food?
generic.trans: 为了一点点吃的，有必要大费周章吗？

bathbomb.en: It smells quite nice, if I'm honest.

voidcloth_scythe.en: If menial tasks must be done, they should be done in style.
voidcloth_scythe.trans: 如果非要我做琐事，那一定要帅气地完成。

spring.en: The entrance has collapsed in on itself.

generic.en: There's a world going on under there.
generic.trans: 在那下面还有一个世界。

quagmire_merm_cart2.en: Well what do we have here?

generic.en: It's just a silly starfish.
generic.trans: 不过是一只愚蠢的海星。

firestarter.en: Stop burning things, mime.
firestarter.trans: 小丑，不要再烧东西。

ghost.en: I could get you a heart, %s... for a price.
ghost.trans: %s，我会给你拿到心…但得有报酬。

murderer.en: Murderous fiend! You cannot escape!
murderer.trans: 杀人不眨眼的恶魔！你跑不了的！

reviver.en: %s is an effective ally.

generic.en: Greetings, Mr. %s.

quagmire_merm_cart1.en: Let's see what they have today.
quagmire_merm_cart1.trans: 我们来看看今天有什么。

ready.en: I've done enough, the old woman can brave the bees herself.
ready.trans: 我做的已经够多了，让那个老妇自己去处理蜜蜂吧。

somehoney.en: I should wait a bit longer.

fullhoney.en: I've done enough, the old woman can brave the bees herself.
fullhoney.trans: 我做的已经够多了，让那个老妇自己去处理蜜蜂吧。

generic.en: I think she made this herself.

nohoney.en: Why do the bees not serve me?
nohoney.trans: 为什么蜜蜂不为我服务？

cabbagerolls.en: Meat rolled in cabbage. How exciting.
cabbagerolls.trans: 菜叶子里包了肉。真刺激。

generic.en: Perhaps I might reign again... as the king of fishing!
generic.trans: 也许我会重登大位……以钓鱼之王的名义！

burnt.en: All my ambitions go up in smoke.
burnt.trans: 我的多少野心都烧成了一柱烟。

lobsterbisque.en: Ah, I do enjoy the finer things.
lobsterbisque.trans: 啊，我确实喜欢精细的东西。

koalefant_carcass.en: What else can I say about this dirty carcass?
koalefant_carcass.trans: 对于这具肮脏的尸体，我还能说什么呢？

yotr_food4.en: Far too sticky for my liking.

yotr_food3.en: A small piece of fruit, imprisoned in gelatin.
yotr_food3.trans: 囚禁在明胶里的一小块水果。

bugnet.trans: 很适合用来抓毫无防备的昆虫。

yotr_food1.en: Cake shaped like a rabbit, how novel.
yotr_food1.trans: 做成兔子形状的蛋糕，真稀罕呐。

slingshotammo_slow.en: Ah, now that might be interesting.

transistor.en: I don't understand how it works, but it does.
transistor.trans: 我不了解它的工作原理，但它确实有用。

wagboss_robot_creation_parts.en: These were built to cause harm.
wagboss_robot_creation_parts.trans: 这些东西造出来就是为了害人。

broken_forgeditem.en: It's of no use to me like this.
broken_forgeditem.trans: 这个样子对我是没用了。

monkey.en: I don't have time for you!
monkey.trans: 我可没时间浪费在你身上！

book_rain.en: What's a ritual without a little showmanship? Surely a prop or two?
book_rain.trans: 缺少了表演还能算仪式吗？至少得有一两件道具吧？

generic.en: Stop looking at me!

fruitflyfruit.en: So this is all it takes to lead.
fruitflyfruit.trans: 原来这就是领导的诀窍。

bodypillow_beefalowool.en: What is the thread count on this?

merm_prince.en: Kings are easily made around here.
merm_prince.trans: 这里当皇帝就跟玩一样。

lucy.en: Ah. How have you been, Lucy?

whip.en: Makes me feel like the master again.
whip.trans: 再次让我有主人的感觉。

frogfishbowl.en: At the end of the day, it's still frog.
frogfishbowl.trans: 不管怎么做，青蛙还是青蛙。

mosquitomusk.en: Do I have to touch it? What if I just stand near it?
mosquitomusk.trans: 我非得碰它么？如果我只是站在它附近呢？

walkingplank_grass.en: Jumping off would ruin what's left of my suit.
walkingplank_grass.trans: 跳下去的话，我剩下的西装也会被泡坏。

gems.en: The fuel needs more focal points.
gems.trans: 燃料需要更多的聚能宝石。

ghostflower.trans: 希望你找到了内心的安宁。

ghost.en: You know the price of revival as well as I do, %s.
ghost.trans: %s，你我都知道复活的代价。

firestarter.en: Never pinned you for the wanton destruction type.
firestarter.trans: 永远不要把自己限定为肆意破坏的类型。

murderer.en: Do not start fights you cannot win!
murderer.trans: 不要挑起你没有胜算的战斗！

reviver.en: %s has excellent command of the dark arts.

generic.en: Good day, Ms. %s.

quagmire_fern.en: Perhaps it has some flavor to it.

generic.en: I could get a chip of ice off the old block.
generic.trans: 我可以从这座旧冰矿上凿点冰块下来。

maxwellthrone.en: It's less painful than it looks. Barely.
maxwellthrone.trans: 它没有看上去那么让人痛苦，但也只是好一点点。

waterballoon.en: Do you have any idea how much this suit cost?
waterballoon.trans: 你知道这衣服得花多少钱吗？

bodypillow_kelp.en: Looking at it is making me seasick.
bodypillow_kelp.trans: 光是看着它我都晕船了。

mastupgrade_lamp_yotd.en: How dare you look down on me!
mastupgrade_lamp_yotd.trans: 你怎么敢对我居高临下！

featherfan.en: Is it windy out or is it just this fan?
featherfan.trans: 外面有风吗？或者只是这个扇子在扇风？

recharging.en: It looks like she'll have to wait, for once.

generic.en: Careful, madam. I know where this trail ultimately leads.
generic.trans: 小心点，夫人。我知道这条路通向哪里。

handpillow_petals.en: Can you rightfully call a sack of potpourri a pillow?
handpillow_petals.trans: 你好意思管一袋干花叫枕头吗？

scanning.en: Hmph. Good luck unraveling the mysteries of my creations.
scanning.trans: 哼，祝你好运，顺利解开我造物的秘密。

hunting.en: Where does it think it's going?

generic.en: I feel like it's watching me...
That was not a good idea!

full.trans: 原来它不幽闭恐怖的时是这样子。

spear_wathgrithr.en: I can appreciate a finely crafted weapon.

nightmarepie.en: I'm going to have dreams about this pie nightmare.
nightmarepie.trans: 这个可怕的饼会让我做噩梦。

ghostlyelixir_attack.en: It appears someone has been toying with the dark arts and crafts.
ghostlyelixir_attack.trans: 看来有人在鼓捣黑暗魔法。

rocky.en: I banished these guys down here for a reason.
rocky.trans: 我把这些家伙放逐到这下面是有原因的。

rocks.en: Hmmm. Now what do I do with them?
rocks.trans: 嗯，现在我该对它们做什么？

archive_moon_statue.en: How did I not know of this place? Did They know?
archive_moon_statue.trans: 我怎么不知道有这个地方？他们知道吗？

kitcoon_deciduous.en: What a pathetic little creature. It will likely grow up to pick my pockets.
kitcoon_deciduous.trans: 多么可悲的小动物。说不定它长大后还会从我口袋里偷东西。

peghook.en: I should like to avoid a pinch from that, I think.
peghook.trans: 我得小心不让那家伙钳住。

pigking.en: That's a man with his priorities in order!
pigking.trans: 这是一个将生活安排得井井有条的男人！

butter.trans: 忍不住想来一句双关语。

molehill.en: Burrow deep, I'm coming for you.

monstermeat_dried.en: My teeth are getting too old for this.
monstermeat_dried.trans: 我的牙根本咬不动这个。

panflute.en: I'm going to sing a song of madness.

lavaarena_battlestandard.en: We must destroy that Battle Standard.
lavaarena_battlestandard.trans: 我们必须摧毁那面战斗旗帜。

saltlick_improved.en: Blech, it's covered in beefalo spit.
saltlick_improved.trans: 恶心，上面都是皮弗娄牛的口水。

support_pillar_dreadstone_complete.en: Hope it's as strong as it looks.
support_pillar_dreadstone_complete.trans: 希望它像看起来一样强大。

dug_marsh_bush.en: Do I look like a gardener?

lots_of_flowers.en: It has a strangely calming effect.

some_flowers.en: Perhaps I should pay my respects as well.
some_flowers.trans: 也许我也该表示一点敬意。

generic.en: I can't help but wonder... no, it couldn't be.

cookedsmallmeat.en: Well, at least it's not moving anymore.

dock_kit.en: So I'm to be a dock builder now, am I?
dock_kit.trans: 所以我现在要沦为一个建码头的工人了，是吗？

durian_cooked.en: A little more refined, at least.

fig.en: A fruit for more refined tastes.
fig.trans: 一种适合高雅口味的水果。

mast_malbatross.en: A warning to any waterfowl that cross us.
mast_malbatross.trans: 警告水鸟们惹我们的下场。

wobster_den.en: What manner of creature lives in there?
wobster_den.trans: 里面住着什么样的生物呢？

quagmire_saltrock.en: It must be ground down before we use it.

bomb_lunarplant.en: Someone's about to have a very bad day.
bomb_lunarplant.trans: 有人要渡过非常不好的一天了。

surfnturf.en: A very balanced meal, I suppose.
surfnturf.trans: 我想这是营养十分均衡的一餐。

amulet.en: It channels the darkest energies of the universe.
amulet.trans: 它输送着宇宙中最黑暗的能量。

portableblender_item.en: Does it have to make such a horrible racket?

sleeping.en: Sleep is only a temporary escape.

generic.en: They aren't very sociable.

burning.en: It better not start talking to me.

diseasing.en: Looks a little off, if you ask me.
diseasing.trans: 如果你问我，我会说看起来有点儿失水准。

diseased.en: What has brought this blight upon my world?
diseased.trans: 是谁把疫病带到我这儿来的？

withered.en: Too hot for that little bush.
withered.trans: 对小小的浆果丛来说温度太高了。

generic.en: Reduced to eating berries. Sigh.

refined_dust.en: It may have some alchemical uses.
refined_dust.trans: 也许可以用在炼金术上。

magician_chest.en: If you're worried about getting stuck inside, don't rummage through my things.
magician_chest.trans: 如果你担心被困在里面，就别乱翻我的东西。

shadowthrall_mouth.en: What are you smiling at, pal?

walkingplank_yotd.en: If I must walk the plank I suppose I can do it in style.
walkingplank_yotd.trans: 如果非要我走跳板，那也得走出风尚。

orangeamulet.en: Simple magic is often the best.
orangeamulet.trans: 简单的魔法往往是最好的。

quagmire_wheat.en: This would be more useful as flour.
quagmire_wheat.trans: 把它磨成面粉会有用得多。

mushroomhat.trans: 它拥有一种精灵的魔法。

salsa.en: A bit spicy for my delicate palate.
salsa.trans: 对我精致的味蕾来说，有点辣了。

minifan.en: This pathetic device... gets the job done.
minifan.trans: 这差劲的工具…还有点用。

nutrientsgoggleshat.en: I suppose the Ancients were farmers once, before they turned to the fuel.
nutrientsgoggleshat.trans: 我想古人在转向燃料之前，也曾经是农民吧。

tapped_ready.en: The sap is ready for collection.

wounded.en: This tree has seen better days.
wounded.trans: 这些植物曾经长得很好。

tapped_empty.en: It is filling. Ever so slowly.

generic.en: A sickly sweet aroma wafts from its branches.
generic.trans: 它的茎秆散发出甜得发腻的气息。

generic.en: What are they hiding down there...

thulecitebugnet.en: I'm glad I'm not an insect.

boatrace_seastack_throwable_deploykit.en: A waypoint. Or perhaps a well-timed obstacle...
boatrace_seastack_throwable_deploykit.trans: 既是航标，但取决于投放时机，也可以是障碍物……

lava_pond_rock.en: With each day I get a little boulder.
lava_pond_rock.trans: 每天我都会获得一个小圆石/更勇敢点。

hermit_pearl.en: It's... strange to be so trusted.
hermit_pearl.trans: 好奇怪……居然如此信任我。

wall_moonrock_item.trans: 我应该把这个放在哪里？

generic.en: They're even ugly as infants.

sleeping.en: Seems we've a few hours of reprieve.
sleeping.trans: 看起来我们可以暂缓几个小时。

book_light_upgraded.trans: 她这是在赤裸裸地炫耀。

spider_whistle.en: It's probably covered in spider spit.
spider_whistle.trans: 多半沾满了蜘蛛的口水。

oceanfishinglure_hermit_heavy.en: I'm reluctant to see what manner of fish would bite THAT.
oceanfishinglure_hermit_heavy.trans: 我不想知道什么鱼会咬那个。

maxwelllock.en: It keeps the master in the chair.
maxwelllock.trans: 它能将主人锁在王座上。

rabbithat.en: The rabbit goes in the hat, not on it. Preposterous.
rabbithat.trans: 兔子是在帽子里，而不是在帽子上。荒谬。

generic.en: The preparations have been made.

empty.en: It requires a torch.
empty.trans: 它需要一根火把。

crimson.trans: 燃料已经占据了主导地位。

cooldown.en: I'd bet it was that insufferable imp who brought it here.
cooldown.trans: 我敢打赌，肯定是那个令人难以忍受的小恶魔把它带到了这里。

enabled.en: Just what manner of magic is this?!

generic.en: My, this is some strange magic, even for me.
generic.trans: 嗯，即使对我来说，这魔法也是很奇特啊。

kelp.en: Can I eat something that's not slimy for once?
kelp.trans: 能不吃这种黏糊的东西吗？

lavaarena_lightdamagerhat.en: That is not suited to me.

differentshard.en: At least it doesn't smell, like some other modes of transportation.
differentshard.trans: 它起码没有什么臭味，不像某些其他交通方式。

generic.en: At least it doesn't smell, like some other modes of transportation.
generic.trans: 它起码没有什么臭味，不像某些其他交通方式。

icehound.en: I had a lot of surplus gems!
icehound.trans: 我有很多剩余的宝石了！

generic.en: Seems we've got it open.

trunkvest_summer.en: It's more of a fall vest.
trunkvest_summer.trans: 这不仅仅是件秋天穿的背心。

sleeping.en: Shhhh! It will wake up hungry.

generic.en: It's mostly digestive system.
generic.trans: 这东西基本上是个消化系统。

generic.en: It's nice, but where's the rust? The exhaust pipes?
generic.trans: 很不错。但是铁锈呢？排气管呢？

woby_treat.en: I thought I saw Wilson munching on one.
woby_treat.trans: 我看见威尔逊啃这个了。

held.en: Now what do I do with it?

generic.en: They work so hard, the fools.
generic.trans: 它们如此辛勤地工作，这些傻瓜。

multiplayer_portal.en: Always did have a flair for the dramatic...
multiplayer_portal.trans: 向来都这么有戏剧天分…

record_worktobedone.en: Forgive me if I've lost my taste for music.
record_worktobedone.trans: 抱歉，是我丢了音乐的品味。

potatosack.en: Potatoes are powerful things, not to be underestimated.
potatosack.trans: 土豆是强大的东西，不容小觑。

chopped.en: That's not about to grow back.

generic.en: An acquaintance of mine describes them as "leafy".
generic.trans: 我的一个熟人说它们“满是阔叶”。

wagstaff_item_1.en: So the glove is no longer an illusion.
wagstaff_item_1.trans: 看来这手套不再是幻象了。

wagstaff_item_2.trans: 他的剪贴板在这。真蹊跷。

yotc_seedpacket_rare.en: This should yield a higher quality crop.
yotc_seedpacket_rare.trans: 它能长出高质量的作物。

generic.en: Could it get any less appealing?
generic.trans: 它会变得不那么吸引人吗？

asparagussoup.en: I suppose you can make soup from anything.
asparagussoup.trans: 我想你可以把任何东西都做成汤。

generic.en: A rather childish weapon, but quite effective in the right hands.
generic.trans: 相当幼稚的武器，但如果使用得当会相当有效。

oceanfishingbobber_malbatross.en: A bit of extra flair goes a long way.
oceanfishingbobber_malbatross.trans: 浮标够酷炫才能扔的远。

book_light.en: Taking some inspiration from the Codex, are we? I'm flattered.
book_light.trans: 受到了《秘典》的启发吗？真够抬举我的。

winter_ornamentboss.en: What a thing to risk one's life for.
winter_ornamentboss.trans: 值得让人冒生命危险的东西。

fishmeat_small.trans: 我已经沦落到捡些小鱼小虾了。

waterpump.en: Higgsbury, I think a bucket would have sufficed...
waterpump.trans: 希格斯伯里，我想一桶应该就够了……

tacklesketch.en: What forbidden fishing knowledge do you hold?
tacklesketch.trans: 你深藏了哪种不为人知的钓鱼秘技？

justeggs.en: We couldn't even spare a little salt?
justeggs.trans: 我们连把盐都拿不出手吗？

mast_yotd_item.en: Do I look like a shipyard laborer?
mast_yotd_item.trans: 我看起来像造船苦力吗？

generic.en: Well it's certainly not deer to me.
generic.trans: 好吧，在我看来，它当然不是鹿。

done.en: Let's hope something palatable has come of it.

generic.en: An instrument of the dark culinary arts.

empty.en: Dismally devoid of foodstuffs.
empty.trans: 吃的东西不幸的什么都不剩了。

portabletent.en: Oh, how I miss sleeping indoors.
portabletent.trans: 哦，我多么怀念在室内睡觉。

generic.en: Meddling with it will only cause further trouble.
generic.trans: 乱动那个只会惹出更多麻烦。

on.en: Let us end this chapter of our journey.
on.trans: 让我们结束这一段旅程吧。

hermitcrabtea_foliage.en: Behold the frailty of our tender little minds.
hermitcrabtea_foliage.trans: 瞧瞧我们那脆弱的小脑袋瓜。

filled.en: Not so tough now, are you?

generic.en: Ugh. Empty.
Mapmaking is a soothing pastime. Methodical.
generic.trans: 绘图是一件令人宽慰的娱乐消遣。极具条理。

durian_oversized.en: Far more than I'd like to have, quite honestly.
durian_oversized.trans: 说实话，我可吃不了这么多。

thulecite_pieces.en: Several of these piles could be combined to form a bigger piece.
thulecite_pieces.trans: 几堆这个可以合成更大的一块。

spoiled.en: Ugh, the smell... can we just put it in the ground already?
spoiled.trans: 呃，这刺鼻的味道……我们不能现在就把它埋下去么？

generic.en: It looks more like a science experiment than a fertilizer.
generic.trans: 比起化肥，它看起来更像一个科学实验。

mutateddeerclops.en: That creature has seen better days.
mutateddeerclops.trans: 那个生物曾经也美好过。

generic.en: Nothing. Am I supposed to be sad for the smelly brigand?
generic.trans: 什么都没有。我应该为那个臭强盗感到难过吗？

generic.en: Pitiful. I'll make short work of that 'shroom.
generic.trans: 可怜。我会迅速干掉那个蘑菇。

empty.en: It's a dirt hole.
empty.trans: 是一个土洞。

oar.en: I have no desire to toil like a common sailor.
oar.trans: 我可不想像寻常水手一样累死累活。

lavaarena_bernie.en: That thing's still shambling about, I see.
lavaarena_bernie.trans: 看来这家伙还是踉踉跄跄地活动。

garlic_seeds.en: Am I supposed to plant these?

wx78_scanner_succeeded.en: That constant blinking light is testing my patience.
wx78_scanner_succeeded.trans: 灯一直在闪烁，简直就是在考验我的耐心。

hermit_bundle_shells.en: Nautical decor was never my style.
hermit_bundle_shells.trans: 航海风格的饰品一向跟我不搭。

block.en: How I've missed the act of creation.

burnt.en: To sculpt, to carve, no more.

empty.en: A block of marble might suffice.
empty.trans: 一块大理石可能就足够了。

has_item.en: Don't expect me to reach in there.

generic.en: Blegh.

minotaur.en: My my, the fuel has changed you.
minotaur.trans: 天哪，噩梦燃料改变了你。

lavaarena_rechargerhat.en: It will quickly restore my powers.
lavaarena_rechargerhat.trans: 它能快速恢复我的力量。

bloom.en: Oh fine, do what you like.

generic.en: Ugh, it smells bad.

support_pillar_dreadstone_scaffold.en: There is work to be done. For someone else.
support_pillar_dreadstone_scaffold.trans: 还有些工作要做，为了别人。

elixir_container.en: Don't think I'm fooled by its innocent appearance.
elixir_container.trans: 别以为我会被它天真无邪的外表迷惑。

mandrakesoup.en: There'll be no more crying out of you.

playing.en: I do enjoy watching people make fools of themselves.
playing.trans: 我就喜欢看别人出洋相。

generic.en: Absolutely not.

lutefisk.en: It has an odd, yet strangely mouthwatering aroma.
lutefisk.trans: 它有种奇怪的，让人流口水的香味。

jellybean.en: I think there's seventeen in there.

wx78module_taser.en: That robot needs to pull themselves together.
wx78module_taser.trans: 那个机器人需要把自己的零件都装好。

watermelonicle.en: The case is cold on the melon.

prime_mate.en: They'll put anyone in charge nowadays.

hot.trans: 呃，真的吗？我已经不舒服了。

generic.en: I don't like the looks of it.
generic.trans: 我不喜欢那玩意的样子。

yotb.en: This might be of interest to the judge.
yotb.trans: 评委也许对这个感兴趣。

generic.en: I've no need for such things.
Are you prepared for what you'll find?
generic.trans: 你做好准备接受新发现了吗？

wagpunk_cagewall.en: The blasted tinkerer wants to trap us like rats.
wagpunk_cagewall.trans: 那个该死的修补匠想把我们像老鼠一样困住。

saddle_wathgrithr.en: I suppose the beast deserves a bit of protection.
saddle_wathgrithr.trans: 我想那野兽应该得到一点保护。

garlic_oversized.en: An unreasonably enormous clump of garlic.
garlic_oversized.trans: 大到不合理的巨型蒜头。

burnt.trans: 聪明反被聪明误，胡萝卜被烧死了。

generic.en: Oh, isn't that clever.
Someone needs a bath.

oceanfishingbobber_goose.en: A bit of extra flair goes a long way.
oceanfishingbobber_goose.trans: 浮标够酷炫才能扔的远。

gears.en: My pets! What has become of you?
gears.trans: 我的宠物！你怎么变成这样了？

wagstaff_machinery.en: The interloper could at least clean up after himself.
wagstaff_machinery.trans: 闯入者起码也该收拾一下自己扔的垃圾。

tacklecontainer.en: Can I really even call it a "box"?

frogglebunwich.en: Has a bit of a kick to it.

boat_cannon_kit.en: Fine. I suppose the task of building it is left to me.
boat_cannon_kit.trans: 好。看来建造它的任务又要交给我了。

freshfruitcrepes.en: Deserves to be eaten with fine silverware. Sadly, I've just my hands.
freshfruitcrepes.trans: 值得用银器来享用。可悲的是，我只有双手。

bearger.trans: 拿走你想要的任何东西。

yotb.en: This might be of interest to the judge.
yotb.trans: 评委也许对这个感兴趣。

generic.en: I've no need for such things.

hot.en: It must be right under my nose!
hot.trans: 它一定就在我的眼皮底下！

generic.en: I can use this to find my missing parts.
generic.trans: 我可以用这个找到我丢失的零件。

warmer.en: I should keep my eyes peeled.

some_kelp.en: Not enough? Where does it end?
some_kelp.trans: 还不够？什么时候是个头？

generic.en: The fishheads are out of salad.

tentacle_pillar_hole.en: Ugh! How can it live down there?

yotb.en: This might be of interest to the judge.
yotb.trans: 评委也许对这个感兴趣。

generic.en: I've no need for such things.
Nice post.

moon_altar_glass.en: This is not its desired destination.

perdfan.en: Now I'll have no problem keeping my cool.
perdfan.trans: 现在要保持我的酷炫就毫无压力了。

kitcoondecor1_kit.en: Surely someone else can set it up.

generic.en: Perhaps it's best left alone.

linked.en: I don't trust the power source.

kitcoon_nametag.en: I've named so many creatures at this point, the novelty has worn off.
kitcoon_nametag.trans: 到如今，我已经给太多生物起过名字了，当初的新鲜感已经消失了。

statueharp_hedgespawner.en: This place is really going to seed.

playing_card.en: It is none other than the four of clubs!

chesspiece_pipe.en: Ceci n'est pas une pipe. Pity.

quagmire_portal_key.en: Good. I can get out of here.
quagmire_portal_key.trans: 很好，我可以离开这里了。

glowberrymousse.en: What a nice change it is to know someone who cooks.

ghostlyelixir_slowregen.en: It appears someone has been toying with the dark arts and crafts.
ghostlyelixir_slowregen.trans: 看来有人在鼓捣黑暗魔法。

slingshot_band_pigskin.en: He'll shoot his eye out if he's not careful.
slingshot_band_pigskin.trans: 他一不小心就会把自己的眼睛打瞎。

pavlova.en: It has a certain elegance to it.

firehound.en: I put fire gems in there as a joke.
firehound.trans: 我把火宝石放在了那里，只是想开个玩笑。

pickledherring.en: I suppose I can't be picky.

oceanfishingbobber_robin.en: I used to see quill floats like this back in England.
oceanfishingbobber_robin.trans: 我在英国的时候见过这种浮在海里的羽毛。

generic.en: It unlocks recipes of middling utility.
generic.trans: 它解锁了中级工具的制造配方。

slingshotammo_scrapfeather.en: Ah, now that might be interesting.

generic.en: This is where I do my own personal research.
generic.trans: 这是我做个人研究的地方。

generic.en: Quite a dapper machine.
generic.trans: 一台造型相当简洁的机器。

lantern.en: I hope it keeps Them away.

moon_altar_crown.en: This powerful energy... I've seen it before.
moon_altar_crown.trans: 如此强大的能量……我曾经见识过。

slingshot_frame_wagpunk.en: He'll shoot his eye out if he's not careful.
slingshot_frame_wagpunk.trans: 他一不小心就会把自己的眼睛打瞎。

moon_altar_astral.en: Why do I get the sense... ah, I'm sure it's nothing.
moon_altar_astral.trans: 为什么我有那种感觉……哎，没事没事。

eyeofterror_mini_grounded.en: I should dispose of it before it hatches.
eyeofterror_mini_grounded.trans: 我应该在它孵化之前把它处理掉。

alterguardian_phase3trap.en: I'd do well to avoid those.

carnivalgame_herding_chick.en: Get back here, you blasted contraption!
carnivalgame_herding_chick.trans: 给我回来，你这个该死的装置！

rage.en: It is coursing with fungal power!

generic.en: What an abomination!

wolfgang_whistle.en: Ah yes. What could be more motivating than the shriek of a whistle?
wolfgang_whistle.trans: 是啊。还有什么比一声尖锐的口哨声更能激励人心呢？

bernie_active.en: Just what am I looking at here?
bernie_active.trans: 我在这里看到的是什么？

broken.en: People have become so reliant on technology. Rather pathetic.
broken.trans: 人们变得如此依赖技术。实在可悲。

generic.en: Only the laziest person would think up this infernal device.
generic.trans: 只有最懒惰的人才会想出这种地狱机器。

turf_cotl_gold.en: A bit gaudy, but it certainly makes an impression.
turf_cotl_gold.trans: 虽然有点花哨，但确实给人留下了深刻的印象。

cutgrass.en: The mundane stuff of the earth.

saddlehorn.en: And I may never put it back on.

ghost.en: Oh dear, whatever will become of your kingdom now?
ghost.trans: 噢天啊，你的王国将来怎么办？

firestarter.en: Who left the tiny green demon unsupervised?!
firestarter.trans: 谁放任这个小绿魔鬼的？！

murderer.en: %s has revealed her true nature!
murderer.trans: %s的本性暴露了！

attacker.en: This is no time for childishness!
attacker.trans: 现在不是犯幼稚的时候！

reviver.en: Ah, thank you, %s.

generic.en: Greetings, Miss %s.

mermking.en: A crown can be a heavy burden...
mermking.trans: 皇冠有时也是沉重的负担……

barnaclesushi.en: At least it's an attempt at sophistication.
barnaclesushi.trans: 至少这也是一种精致的尝试。

lunar_grazer.en: I have a feeling this pest won't be dispatched so easily.
lunar_grazer.trans: 我有一种感觉，这种害虫不会这么容易被打发掉。

chesspiece_minotaur.en: Always keep things close to the chest, right pal?
chesspiece_minotaur.trans: 自个的东西要看牢一点，对吧，伙计？

wx78module_nightvision.en: That robot needs to pull themselves together.
wx78module_nightvision.trans: 那个机器人需要把自己的零件都装好。

pirate_flag_pole.en: That's not exactly a welcome sight.

chesspiece_muse.en: Must everything be about my shortcomings?
chesspiece_muse.trans: 一切都必须和我的毛病相关吗？

purplemooneye.en: A decent enough use of the gem's power, I suppose.

growing.en: I have better things to do than watch plants grow.
growing.trans: 比起看植物是怎么长大的，我有更重要的事情要做。

generic.en: Do I look like a farmer?
Yuck.

uncarved.en: Without a face, it's just a pumpkin.
uncarved.trans: 没有脸的话，它就只是个南瓜。

generic.en: Nice face.

slingshot_handle_jelly.en: He'll shoot his eye out if he's not careful.
slingshot_handle_jelly.trans: 他一不小心就会把自己的眼睛打瞎。

rock_petrified_tree.en: I think it looks much better this way.
rock_petrified_tree.trans: 我觉得这样看起来更好。

bodypillow_steelwool.en: It will either protect me or cut me to ribbons.
bodypillow_steelwool.trans: 它可能会保护我，也可能将我切成丝带。

scorched_skeleton.en: At least the fire cut down on the smell.
scorched_skeleton.trans: 至少火的气味有所减少。

succulent_picked.en: It didn't put up much of a fight.
succulent_picked.trans: 这并不能称得上是一场战斗。

festivefish.en: I don't know what's so festive about it.
festivefish.trans: 我不知道它哪里喜庆了。

costume_king_body.en: I think that one will fit me nicely.

kitcoon_marsh.en: What a pathetic little creature. It smells of sulphur.
kitcoon_marsh.trans: 多么可悲的小动物。它身上有硫磺味。

recharging.en: It looks like she'll have to wait, for once.

generic.en: Careful, madam. I know where this trail ultimately leads.
generic.trans: 小心点，夫人。我知道这条路通向哪里。

tamales.en: They've got a bit of kick to them.

following_other.en: You are only as good as the company you keep.

generic.en: What is the matter with you?

pigskin.trans: 当时不是他死就是我亡。

guacamole.en: There's a mole in the mix.

hammer.en: It feels good to undo the work of others.
hammer.trans: 破坏别人的劳动成果感觉真好。

wagpunkbits_kit.en: A machine to fix a machine? What is this world coming to?
wagpunkbits_kit.trans: 机器修理机器？这是什么世道？

voidcloth_boomerang.en: Wonderous... and in my color too.
voidcloth_boomerang.trans: 太棒了...而且也是我的颜色。

carrot_cooked.en: A little more refined, at least.

wagdrone_beacon.en: An invisible wall? There must be a magical explanation for this.
wagdrone_beacon.trans: 隐形墙？这肯定又是魔法把戏。

dumbbell_bluegem.en: It has all the grace and subtlety I'd expect from the strongman.
dumbbell_bluegem.trans: 它具有我所期望的壮士的所有优雅和微妙。

berrysauce.en: This seems like a lot of fuss for some mashed berries.
berrysauce.trans: 不就是水果泥吗，怎么还费这么些功夫。

eyeofterror.en: Don't look at me, it's definitely not one of mine.
eyeofterror.trans: 别看我，这绝对不是我的作品。

playing.en: A simple matter of memorization. I'll show you just how easy it is.
playing.trans: 一个简单的记忆问题。我秀给你看这有多容易。

generic.en: It requires payment.
It makes me a little nostalgic.

voidcloth.en: It would be a shame to let this material go to waste.
voidcloth.trans: 这材料如果被浪费掉，那就太可惜了。

occupied.en: I suppose I'll have to try to make this creature less homely.
occupied.trans: 看来我要亲自减少给它的丑陋了。

generic.en: How ridiculous.

monkey_mediumhat.en: I'm sure it's full of fleas.
monkey_mediumhat.trans: 我敢肯定里面有很多跳蚤。

walrus_tusk.en: I'll put this to better use.
walrus_tusk.trans: 我会让它有更好的用途。

cave_banana_tree.en: It looks like a banana, but I'm not buying it.
cave_banana_tree.trans: 它看起来像香蕉，但我可不相信。

burnt.en: It's no use to anyone now.
burnt.trans: 它现在对任何人都没有用处了。

generic.en: A tree with a foul demeanor.

potatotornado.en: What an odd way to serve potatoes.
potatotornado.trans: 这么处理土豆真是奇怪。

firestarter.en: Is it wise to start fires, given your predilections?
firestarter.trans: 从你的嗜好来讲，点火是明智之举吗？

ghost.en: That blockhead could use a heart.
ghost.trans: 那个木头人能使用心。

mooseghost.en: I'll leave you to you moose-ings while I seek out a heart.
mooseghost.trans: 你慢慢沉思吧，我去找颗心给你。

murderer.en: Fiend! Time to make like a tree...!
murderer.trans: 恶魔！是时候离开了…!

goose.en: Not the most dignified form you've taken.
goose.trans: 这种变身有点不上台面。

moose.trans: 太好了。一头缺根弦的鹿。

gooseghost.en: It seems you've run a-fowl of something, pal.

reviver.en: %s seems very in touch with the spirits of the forest.

beaver.trans: 哈，多么令人愉悦的诅咒。

generic.en: Greetings, Mr. %s.

bundlewrap.en: I guess we could wrap a few things up.
bundlewrap.trans: 我猜我们可以把一些东西打包起来。

mushgnome.en: I don't trust anyone who walks so jauntily.
mushgnome.trans: 我不相信任何一个走得如此欢快的人。

carnival_seedpacket.en: About as pleasant as you'd expect.
carnival_seedpacket.trans: 和你预期的一样令人愉快。

reviving.en: Vile thing is coming back for more!
reviving.trans: 这邪恶的东西又回来了！

generic.en: Hope it stays dead.

mutatedwarg.en: I don't care for the new look.

generic.en: It's a tinderbox.

oceantree.trans: 水里都长树了，接下来呢？

oceanfishinglure_spinner_green.en: At least I don't have to use worms.

trinket_41.en: I've no idea what that is.

trinket_43.en: What use would I have of such a thing?
trinket_43.trans: 这种东西对我有什么用？

stafflight.en: That should chase the shadows away.
stafflight.trans: 这东西应该能赶走暗影。

trinket_45.trans: 至少放的不是老掉牙的音乐。

slingshotammo_lunarplanthusk.en: Ah, now that might be interesting.

yotc_carrat_race_start_item.en: Might as well start things off with a bang. Or a gong.
yotc_carrat_race_start_item.trans: 可以用号令枪啪的一声开始。也可以用锣。

trinket_46.en: Some harebrained invention of the scientist's, perhaps?
trinket_46.trans: 也许是科学家有欠考虑的一项发明？

mermarmorhat.en: Does it look I have the bulbous head of a merm?
mermarmorhat.trans: 我的头看起来像鱼人的球型脑袋吗？

chesspiece_wormboss.en: I can still smell it's breath.

handpillow_beefalowool.en: What is the thread count on this?

ghostlyelixir_speed.en: It appears someone has been toying with the dark arts and crafts.
ghostlyelixir_speed.trans: 看来有人在鼓捣黑暗魔法。

voidcloth_kit.trans: 有些东西是可以修复的。

turf_dragonfly.trans: 它很温暖，但会平息火焰。

level_3.en: I think that's about as much clutter as one could possibly throw on a tree.
level_3.trans: 我认为这已经是树能承载的垃圾的极限了。

generic.en: It's about as festive as I like it. Which is not at all.
generic.trans: 毫无节日气氛，这点我喜欢。

level_2.en: The birds seem to enjoy it. Some creatures just lack any taste.
level_2.trans: 鸟儿们似乎很喜欢它。有些生物就是缺乏品味。

trinket_30.en: Not a pawn, but still a minion.
trinket_30.trans: 不是兵卒，但仍然是个随从。

trinket_32.trans: 给孩子们看的业余魔术。

trinket_31.en: Not a pawn, but still a minion.
trinket_31.trans: 不是兵卒，但仍然是个随从。

generic.en: What's it always chewing on?

merm_armory.en: Apparently, I'm not invited. Oh how shall I ever go on.
merm_armory.trans: 我居然没有得到邀请。这让我怎么继续下去。

done.trans: 终于有一些美食出炉了。

burnt.en: A bit overdone for my tastes.
burnt.trans: 就我的口味而言，它烧过头了。

empty.en: They didn't always live off of the fuel.
empty.trans: 它们也不是一直需要燃料。

palmcone_seed.en: One day it might grow into something useful.
palmcone_seed.trans: 也许有一天，它会长成有用之材。

trinket_38.en: You are all ants in my eyes already.
trinket_38.trans: 你们现在看上去都像蚂蚁了。

oceanvine_cocoon.en: It looks like someone's already made themselves comfortable here.
oceanvine_cocoon.trans: 看起来有人已经在这里自得其乐了。

trinket_37.en: I told you people, I am *not* a vampire!
trinket_37.trans: 我告诉你们，人类，我*不*是一个吸血鬼！

pepper_cooked.en: Slightly more exciting than the usual vegetable.
pepper_cooked.trans: 比普通蔬菜稍微刺激一点。

trinket_34.en: I'm done tampering with magical oddities, thank-you.
trinket_34.trans: 我受够奇怪的魔法了，谢谢。

mosquitomermsalve.en: Let's test it on one of those merms, shall we?
mosquitomermsalve.trans: 不然咱们找个鱼人试试？

trinket_35.en: I'm not in the habit of imbibing strange liquids.
trinket_35.trans: 我不习惯吸取奇怪的液体。

generic.en: How are birds getting in here?

houndstooth.en: It could be used for fashion.

carnivalgame_feedchicks_nest.en: What are they hiding down there...

beequeen.en: I didn't make that one! Really!

generic.en: A fire pit.

playing.en: I imagine some people might find this amusing.
playing.trans: 我想有人还会觉得这个有趣吧。

generic.en: It requires payment.

moon_tree_blossom.en: It came from that odd tree.

trinket_21.en: I know when I've been beaten.
trinket_21.trans: 我知道我是什么时候被打败的。

trinket_20.en: Eliminates the use of the phrase "You scratch my back, I'll scratch yours."
trinket_20.trans: 不要再用 “你帮我，我也帮你” 这句话。

carnival_gametoken.en: Fine. I'll play your silly little games.
carnival_gametoken.trans: 好吧。我玩你那些愚蠢的小游戏。

fence_junk.en: Hmph. It'll certainly repel anyone with taste.
fence_junk.trans: 哼。任何有品味的人肯定会避之不及。

locked.en: It seems I am to be judged.
locked.trans: 看起来我才是要被审判的。

generic.en: A relic best forgotten.

trinket_27.en: Finally. My suits were getting wrinkles. Wrinkles!
trinket_27.trans: 最后。我的衣服起皱。起皱了！

trinket_26.en: This was important to one very specific person once.
trinket_26.trans: 曾经这对某些人很重要。

generic.en: Ugh, go away!

goldnugget.en: This was important to me once.
goldnugget.trans: 这东西曾经对我很重要。

potato_oversized.en: It has more starch than my best suit.
potato_oversized.trans: 它的淀粉含量比我最好的衣服还多。

trinket_29.en: It is still beholden to the king.

trinket_28.en: It is still beholden to the king.

trinket_22.en: The monster child gets tangled in this frequently.
trinket_22.trans: 这怪兽小孩经常在这里被困住。

trinket_25.en: The strongman's wardrobe is brimming with them, judging from the odor.
trinket_25.trans: 依味道判断，这些东西被藏在巨人的柜子里。

ivy_snare.en: I nearly got my suit caught on those thorns!
ivy_snare.trans: 我的西装差点被那些刺勾破！

icestaff2.en: Want to see a cool trick? I just need a volunteer...
icestaff2.trans: 想看个“酷毙了”的把戏吗？我只需要一名志愿者……

icestaff3.en: I'll show you a chilling display of magic.
icestaff3.trans: 我给你展示展示什么叫令人胆寒的魔术。

picked.trans: 仙人球？我看更像仙人掌！

generic.en: Puffer plant.

hutch.en: Stick your tongue in. You're getting slobber on my pantlegs.
hutch.trans: 把舌头缩回去。你的口水流到我裤管了。

slingshotammo_thulecite.en: Ah, now that might be interesting.

firestaff.trans: 一个基础魔法，但是很有效。

silk.en: Despite its origin, it could make some fine garments.
silk.trans: 不论它来自哪里，至少可以做成不错的衣服。

waterplant.en: I'm sure its delicate appearance is just a ruse for us to let our guard down.
waterplant.trans: 我相信它精致的外表只是让我们放松警惕的一条诡计。

trinket_10.en: Is that a crack about my age?

active.en: I can never decide what I want.
active.trans: 我总是拿不定主意要点什么喝。

burnt.en: I don't suppose she had insurance.
burnt.trans: 想必她是没买过保险的。

generic.en: Where is that Pearl?

critterlab.en: Am I being watched by that rock?
critterlab.trans: 我是不是正在被那块岩石监视？

rabbitking_passive.en: Spare me the token gesture. Simon knows what he did.
rabbitking_passive.trans: 别在那惺惺作态了。西蒙知道他做了什么。

dragontailhat.en: The back end of a terrible beast.

trinket_16.en: Charlie was the only one who ever kept me in check.
trinket_16.trans: 查理是唯一一个能下过我的人。

chesspiece_beefalo.en: At least this version doesn't shed all over my poor suit.
chesspiece_beefalo.trans: 至少这个版本不会在我可怜的西装上掉毛。

lighter.en: It does the job, I suppose.

trinket_15.en: Charlie was the only one who ever kept me in check.
trinket_15.trans: 查理是唯一一个能下过我的人。

trinket_17.en: The product of a very immature magician, perhaps.
trinket_17.trans: 可能由不成熟的魔法师的制作。

trinket_12.en: I'm not touching that without several pairs of gloves.
trinket_12.trans: 不戴几副手套我才不会碰那个。

trinket_14.en: Perhaps I'll invite the librarian for a nice mandrake tea.
trinket_14.trans: 或许我要请那位图书管理员喝美味的曼德拉草茶。

generic.en: I am filled with the irrational urge to stomp upon it.
generic.trans: 我现在充满了想踩它几脚的冲动。

trinket_13.en: Don't look at me like that.

quagmire_garlic.en: I suppose that's why there are no vampires around.
quagmire_garlic.trans: 吸血鬼恐怕就是被它吓跑的吧。

ghostlyelixir_retaliation.en: It appears someone has been toying with the dark arts and crafts.
ghostlyelixir_retaliation.trans: 看来有人在鼓捣黑暗魔法。

young.en: Have we nothing better to do with our time?
young.trans: 难道我们没有更好的事情来打发时间吗？

trinket_19.en: Admittedly, it's difficult to maintain balance when you're on top.
trinket_19.trans: 不得不说，当你在上面时很难保持平衡。

firestarter.en: %s has been starting fires, now hasn't he?
firestarter.trans: %s一直在纵火，对不对?

ghost.en: What a shame. Now I'll never know what that gem does.
ghost.trans: 可惜了。我再也不会知道那颗宝石能做什么。

murderer.en: Don't worry, %s. I'll make it a clear cut.
murderer.trans: 别担心，%s。我下手快准狠。

attacker.en: It's time you make like a tree and leaf.
attacker.trans: 你该走了，去落叶归根吧。

reviver.en: I suppose he has his uses.

generic.en: Greetings, Mr. %s.

slingshot_band_tentacle.en: He'll shoot his eye out if he's not careful.
slingshot_band_tentacle.trans: 他一不小心就会把自己的眼睛打瞎。

bananajuice.en: It doesn't do much for my refined palate.
bananajuice.trans: 对我高雅的味觉来说它什么都不是。
